text: Tɩ ya wʋn dɛna nẽrba n ka tarɩ yelle, ãna sõŋa ka tara dẽgrɔ. Tɩ ya wʋn dɛna Nawẽnnɛ kɔma n ka tarɩ dõrga n boe nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ la nẽr-yaalsɩ tẽŋasʋka, yẽgra wʋ peelem dũnia wã zuo,

ref: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
text: wʋn pa'alɛ nẽrba yetɔga n bɔ'ɔrɩ vɔm. Ya sãn ẽŋɛ bɛla, ya wʋn botɩ mam zuugo zẽkɛ Krisi lemŋo daarɛ, pa'alɛ tɩ mam tõoma, la mam n mõrgrɩ la wuu dagɩ zãŋa.

ref: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
text: Ba sãn kʋ mam, la wʋn ãna wʋ kãabgɔ pa'asɛ yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra tɩ la ãna wʋ kãabgɔ bɔ ẽ na pʋam. Baa la sãn dɛna bɛla, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, la mam wʋn ẽŋɛ sũ-yẽlga la yãma wuu.

ref: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
text: Bɛla, ya mẽ tara sũ-yẽlga lagɩm na mam sɩrʋm. Apolɩ yetɩ a tõm Atimõtɩ la A'epafroditi

ref: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
text: Mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi sãn sõŋɛ, la kãn yuuge dee tɩ mam tõm Atimõtɩ ya zẽ'am, tɩ m wʋn tã'agɛ bãŋɛ yãma n ãn se'em tɩ m sũure mã'agɛ.

ref: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
text: Nẽra ka boe mam zẽ'am n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ ayɩla la mam n fablɩ ya yelle, sãn dagna ẽŋa mã'a.

ref: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
text: Nẽra woo zɩgrɩ la a mẽŋa yelle, la dagɩ Azezi-krisi yelle.

ref: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
text: Ya mi Atimõtɩ n pa'alɛ ẽŋa n masɛ se'em, lagɩm na mam wʋ bia n lagɩm na a sɔ la, tõm kõ-yẽlga la tõoma se'em.

ref: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
text: Bɛla, mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ mam wʋn tõm na ẽŋa ya zẽ'am tɔtɔ, mam sãn wa bãŋɛ m yɛla la n wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em.

ref: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
text: La mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ sɩra sɩra la Zuudãana tɩ la sãn ẽŋɛ fẽe, mam mẽŋa wʋn wa'am ya zẽ'am.

ref: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
text: Mam tẽ'esɛ tɩ la ãn sõŋa tɩ mam tõm tɩ sɔbia A'epafroditi n de mam tõntõn-tadãana n lagɩm na mam nãmsɛ la, tɩ a leme wa'am ya zẽ'am, ẽŋa tɩ ya daan tõm, tɩ a tarɩ sõŋrɛ wa'am wa bɔ mam m nãmsgɔ la pʋam.

ref: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
text: A boorɩ mɛ halɩ la a sũure wuu tɩ a yẽ ya wuu, a sũure sã'am mɛ halɩ, yãma n wõm a bã'asɩ la ĩyã.

ref: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
text: Asɩra, a daan bẽ'erɩ mɛ deege la a ki. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zoe a ninbãalga, la, la dagɩ ẽŋa mã'a ninbãalga, la po dɛna la mam mẽ ĩyã, tɩ mam da le yẽ sũ-sã'aŋɔ pa'asɛ.

ref: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
text: Bɛla tɩ mam tõm ẽ ya zẽ'am tɔtɔ, tɩ ya sãn yẽ ẽ, ya sũure wʋn le ẽŋɛ yẽlʋm, tɩ mam mẽ sũ-sã'aŋɔ wʋn bo'oge.

ref: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
text: To'oge-ya ẽ la sũ-yẽlga wʋ lan masɛ, ẽn de tɩ sɔbia Zuudãana sore pʋam na. Nanna-ya nẽr-bãna taaba.

ref: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
text: Se'ere n soe la, a daan deege la a ki Krisi tõoma ĩyã, a põsɛ a yõorɛ mɛ sõŋɛ mam la sõŋrɛ sɛka tɩ yãma ka tã'agɛ sõŋɛ mam na.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
text: Sɛla n deege, m sɔbiisi, ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam. La ka nãmsrɩ mam tɩ m le gʋlsɛ bõn-bãna bɔ ya, se'ere n soe la, ba wʋn sõŋɛ ya mɛ tɩ sɛla da ẽŋɛ ya.

ref: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
text: Guuse-ya ya mẽŋa la nẽr-sɛba n ãn wʋ baasɩ la, nẽr-bãma n tõnnɩ tõon-be'ero, dee mõrgra nẽrba botɩ ba wãta ĩyã mã'a la.

ref: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
text: Tõma n pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ la a Sɩa pãŋa, dee ɩta sũ-yẽlga Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam, ka te'ege nẽrsaalba n ɩtɩ sɛla la, tõma n de nẽrba n wã wãaga mẽŋa mẽŋa.

ref: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
text: Nẽrsaalba sisgo sãn tarɩ nɩ yõorɔ, mam mẽ tarɩ nõorɛ mɛ tɩ m dɩkɛ m mẽŋa te'ege ba. Nẽra sãn tẽ'esɛ tɩ ẽŋa tarɩ nõorɛ tɩ a te'ege nẽrsaalba sisgo, mam n tara nõorɛ gãnna.

ref: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
text: Ba dɔgɛ mam mɛ, dabsa anii daarɛ tɩ ba wã mam. Mam de la Ɩsrayɛlɩ nẽra, Abẽnzamẽ buuri, mam de la Ebre nẽra mẽŋa mẽŋa. La sãn dɛna Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ la doosgo, mam de la Farisi nẽra.

ref: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
text: Mam daan mõ'ogɛ nifo mɛ lɔɔ la yelle halɩ daan nãmsɛ Azezi nẽrba. La sãn dɛna lɔɔ la sakrɛ, mam daan ka tarɩ dõrga.

ref: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
text: La bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ mam daan dɩkɛ tɩ la dɛna yõorɔ bɔ mam na, mam dɩkɛ ba wuu tɩ ba dɛna la zãŋa Krisi ĩyã.

ref: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
text: Mam n bãŋɛ Azezi-krisi n de m Zuudãana n ãn sõŋa gãnna wuu la, mam bɩsɛ bõn-bãma wuu wʋ sɛla n ka tarɩ yõorɔ. Krisi ĩyã mam basɛ bõn-bãma mɛ, bɩsɛ ba wʋ sɔgrɔ tɩ m tã'agɛ yẽ Krisi,

ref: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
text: lagɩm na ẽ dɛna ayɩla. Mam ka le yetɩ la de la lɔɔ la sakrɛ ĩyã tɩ mam masɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am, la de la mam n bɔ Krisi sɩra la ĩyã. Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ mam masɛ, mam n bɔ sɩra la ĩyã.

ref: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
text: Mam n boorɩ se'em wuu de la m bãŋɛ Krisi, la pãn-sɛka n basɛ tɩ a vo'oge la, la m lagɩm na ẽ nãmsɛ, ãna wʋ ẽn ãn se'em a kũm na pʋam,

ref: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
text: tɩ m tara pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ mam mẽ wʋn vo'oge.

ref: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
text: Mam ka yetɩ mam darɛ paagɛ bõn-sɛka tɩ mam boorɩ la mɛ, bɩɩ mam darɛ masɛ mɛ sɛla woo pʋam, mam ken mõrgra mɛ tɩ m paagɛ gʋrɛ ẽ, se'ere n soe la, Krisi dẽŋɛ gʋrɛ mam mɛ.

ref: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
text: M sɔbiisi, mam ka tẽ'esɛ tɩ mam darɛ yãŋɛ gʋrɛ ẽ. Mam ɩtɩ la sɛla ayɩla, mam yĩnni bõn-sɛba n boe mam poorʋm na mɛ, dee mõrgra tɩ m yẽ sɛla n boe nẽŋa na.

ref: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
text: Mam zotɩ wɛ'ɛsa la nẽŋa tɩ m paagɛ a tɛka to'oge bɔ'a la tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wi mam tɩ m to'oge a yire Azezi-krisi ĩyã la.

ref: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
text: Tõma sɛba wuu n bɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo pʋam na, tɩ tara-ya pʋtẽ'e-ẽna. La sɛla ayɩla yelle, ya sãn tara pʋtẽ'erɛ ayẽma, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn vẽlgɛ ya tɩ ya bãŋɛ ẽn de bõn-sɛka.

ref: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
text: La, lan de se'em wuu, tõma n sẽŋɛ paagɛ zẽ'e-sɛka wã, tɩ ken sẽnna wɛ'ɛsa zẽ'e-sɛka tɩ tɩ we'esɩ la.

ref: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
text: M sɔbiisi, lagɩm ɩta-ya mam n ɩtɩ se'em na, bɩsra-ya sɛba yel-ɩrɛ n ãn wʋ tõma n ɩtɩ se'em na, tɩ la dɛna mãmsgɔ bɔ ya.

ref: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
text: Mam daan dẽŋɛ yele ya mɛ nõorɛ faa, la mam le yɛta ya mɛ la nintãm, tɩ nẽrba zozo'e n boe tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ pa'ala tɩ ba de la Azezi-krisi kũm dɔ-puurŋa la bɛ'ɛba.

ref: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
text: Nẽr-bãma n boorɩ se'em na n de ba wẽnnɛ, ba ba'asgɔ de la sã'aŋɔ. Ba dɩkrɩ la sɛla n de ba yãnnɛ wẽ'era ba yõ'orɔ, ba tẽ'esrɩ la sɛla n de dũnia bõnɔ mã'a yelle.

ref: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
text: La sãn dɛna tõma, tõma de la Nawẽnnɛ yire nẽrba, tõma gu'uri la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi n de tɩ Fãagra tɩ a ze'ele bilam wa'am.

ref: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
text: Bɛla, m sɔbiisi, mam nõŋɛ ya mɛ bɔɔra tɩ m le yẽ ya, yãma n botɩ mam tara sũ-yẽlga, dee wʋn botɩ mam yẽ nã'asgɔ la. M sɔbi-nõŋrɩsɩ, zɛ-ya kãŋkãŋɛ bɛla Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.

ref: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
text: Mam belnɩ A'evodi, la Asẽntiisi tɩ ba tara nõorɛ ayɩla Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam.

ref: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
text: La fõn mẽ, m tõntõn-tadãan-sõŋɔ, mam sosrɩ fʋ mɛ tɩ fʋ sõŋɛ pɔg-bãma. Ba daan lagɩm na mam mɛ, la Akelma, la mam tõntõn-taaba basɛba la, mõrgɛ tõm Krisi kõ-yẽlga la tõoma, tɩ ba wuu yʋ'ʋra gʋlsɛ vɔm gõŋɔ pʋam.

ref: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
text: Ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga daarɛ woo Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam. Mam le yɛta ya mɛ ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga.

ref: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ nẽrba wuu bãŋɛ ya sũ-bʋgsʋm yelle. Zuudãana la lemŋo lɛm mɛ.

ref: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
text: Da fabla-ya sɛla sɛla yelle, la sɛla woo pʋam pʋ'ʋsra-ya sɔsra Nawẽnnɛ, la ya pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ, pa'alɛ-ya ẽ yãma n boorɩ sɛla.

ref: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
text: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm n gãnnɩ nẽrsaalba bãŋrɛ wuu, tɩ a gu'ura ya sũure, la ya tẽ'esgɔ Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam.

ref: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
text: M sɔbiisi, sɛla n deege, basɛ-ya tɩ ya pʋtẽ'era tẽ'esra sɛla woo n de sɩra, la sɛla woo n narɩ nã'asgɔ, la sɛla woo n masɛ, la sɛla woo n tarɩ pʋpeelem, la sɛla woo n ɩtɩ sũure yẽlʋm, la sɛla woo tɩ nẽrba yetɩ la ãn sõŋa, tẽ'esra-ya bõn-sɛba wuu n ãn sõŋa masɛ pẽka yelle.

ref: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
text: Ɩta-ya bõn-sɛba tɩ mam zãsʋm ya, tɩ ya to'oge, sɛla tɩ ya wõm dee yẽ mam zẽ'am na, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ'ɔrɩ sũ-mã'asʋm na wʋn bɔna la ya lɛ. Apolɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ Filipi dõma ba sõŋrɛ ĩyã

ref: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
text: Mam ẽŋɛ sũ-yẽlga zozo'e mɛ Zuudãana doosgo pʋam, mam n yẽ tɩ yãma yãŋa le tẽegɛ mam yelle sõŋɛ mam na. Asɩra, mam mi tɩ yãma daan tẽ'esrɩ mam yelle mɛ, la ya daan ka yẽ la sore sõŋɛ mam.

ref: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
text: La dagɩ tɩ mam boorɩ la sɛla ĩyã tɩ mam yele bɛla. Mam zãsʋm mɛ ɩta sũ-yẽlga sɛla woo pʋam la bõn-sɛka tɩ mam tarɩ la.

ref: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
text: Mam tã nõŋɔ pʋam vɔa mɛ, la mam ken tãna bõntarsõm pʋam vɔa mɛ. Sɛla woo pʋam, la zẽ'a woo mam zãsʋm mɛ, tɩ la sãn dɛna mam di tɩgɛ mɛ, bɩɩ kɔm, bɩɩ mam tarɩ mɛ tɩ la seke, bɩɩ mam ka tarɩ, mam mi mam wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em mɛ.

ref: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
text: Mam tã ɩta sɛla woo mɛ, Krisi n bɔ'ɔrɩ mam pãŋa la ĩyã.

ref: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
text: La baa bɛla, ya ẽŋɛ sõŋa, yãma n sõŋɛ mam m toogo la pʋam na.

ref: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
text: Yãma Filipi dõma, yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ mam n daan pɔsɛ mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya, dee daan ze'ele Masedʋanɩ fõrgɛ la, mam ka to'oge sɛla Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba zẽ'am baa zẽ'a ayɩla, sãn dagna yãma mã'a zẽ'am.

ref: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
text: Se'ere n soe la, mam n daan boe Tesaloniki tẽŋa la, yãma daan tõm sõŋrɛ bɔ mam mɛ nõorɛ faa.

ref: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
text: La dagɩ tɩ mam eerɩ la bɔ'a, mam n boorɩ sɛla de la ya yẽ yɔɔrɔ zo'oge.

ref: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
text: Mam to'oge sɛla woo tɩ yãma bɔ mam na mɛ, la seke gãŋɛ mɛ. Mam n to'oge ya bɔ'a la tɩ A'epafroditi tarɩ wa'am na, mam tarɩ mɛ tɩ sɛla ka le pɔ'ɔgɛ mam. Bɔ'a bãma ãn wʋ sɛla yũuŋo n ãn yẽlʋm tɩ ya kãabɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ a to'oge la sũ-yẽlga.

ref: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
text: Mam dãana Nawẽnnɛ n tarɩ bõn-sõma wuu tɩ la zo'oge gãŋɛ la, wʋn bɔ ya sɛla woo n wʋn sõŋɛ ya Azezi-krisi ĩyã.

ref: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
text: Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Sɔ wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ daarɛ woo wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina. Pʋ'ʋsgɔ

ref: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
text: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu n dolɩ Azezi-krisi la. Tɩ sɔbi-sɛba n boe la mam na pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

ref: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
text: Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya, lan gãnnɩ wuu nẽr-sɛba n boe na-keko yire la pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

ref: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
text: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em, la tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ

ref: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
text: n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba n boe Kolɔsɩ, dɛna tɩ sɔbiisi n de sɩra dõma Krisi sore doosgo pʋam na. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm. Apolɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ

ref: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi Sɔ a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ, tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ ẽ mɛ yãma ĩyã wakatɛ wuu.

ref: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
text: Tõma wõm ban tɔgrɩ yãma n bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra, dee nõŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba wuu se'em,

ref: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
text: yãma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bĩŋe a yire gu'ura tɩ a bɔ ya la ĩyã. La de la yãma n dẽŋɛ wõm sɩra yetɔga n de Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la, n botɩ yãma tara pʋtẽ'erɛ ẽŋa.

ref: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
text: Kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa paagɛ yãma zẽ'am mɛ, wʋ ẽn paagɛ dũnia zẽ'esɩ wuu se'em na, la a ɩtɩ nẽrba sõŋa mɛ, tɩ ba sakra zozo'e, tɩ ba kãllɛ pa'asra. A mẽ ɩtɩ la bɛla yãma zẽ'am lan sẽŋɛ la daar-sɛka tɩ yãma wõm, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ sɩra sɩra la.

ref: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
text: Yãma zãsʋm bõn-ẽŋa la A'epafrasɩ n de tõma tõntõn-tadãana tɩ tõma nõŋɛ la zẽ'am. A de la Azezi-krisi tõntõnna n de sɩra dãana tõnna bɔ'ɔra yãma.

ref: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
text: Ẽŋa n yele tõma Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n basɛ tɩ yãma tara nõŋlʋm se'em.

ref: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
text: Bɛla tɩ lan sẽŋɛ la daar-sɛka tɩ tõma wõm yãma yelle la, tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ yãma ĩyã wa paam lɛɛlɛ wã. Tõma sosrɩ ẽ tɩ a botɩ ya bãŋɛ ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em sõŋa sõŋa, la ya tara yɛm, la bãŋrɛ wuu tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa bɔ'ɔrɩ.

ref: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
text: Tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ wʋn masɛ wʋ Zuudãana la n boorɩ se'em, tɩ la paagɛ a yɛm sɛla woo pʋam. Tɩ ya wʋn tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ pa'asɛ.

ref: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
text: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ ya pãŋa sɛla woo pʋam a na'am pãn-kãtɛ la ĩyã, tɩ ya wʋn wĩbe sɛla woo pʋam la sũ-mã'asʋm.

ref: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
text: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ la sũ-yẽlga, ẽŋa n basɛ tɩ ya tãna wʋn po to'oge bõn-sõma tɩ a bĩŋe tɩ a bɔ a nẽrba a so'olʋm n de peelem pʋam na.

ref: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
text: Nawẽnnɛ fãagɛ tɩ mɛ lika pãŋa pʋam, tarɩ tɩ sẽŋɛ a Bi-nõŋrɛ so'olʋm pʋam.

ref: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
text: Ẽŋa ĩyã tõma yẽ fãarɛ mɛ, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ basɛ tɩ tõon-be'ero taalɛ. Krisi n de sɛka

ref: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
text: Azezi-krisi de la Nawẽnnɛ tɩ ba ka yẽtɩ la wõnnɛ. Ẽŋa n de bõn-sɛba n nãam na wuu yiɛn dãana.

ref: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
text: La doose la ẽŋa tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam sɛla woo, bõn-sɛba n boe dũnia zuo la saazuum, bõn-sɛba tɩ ba yẽtɩ, la bõn-sɛba tɩ ba ka yẽtɩ, bõn-sɛba n tarɩ na'am, la zuudãandõma, la pãnsɩ dõma, la kɛ'ɛndõma wuu. La doose la ẽŋa tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam sɛla woo, tɩ la dɛna a bõnɔ.

ref: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
text: Ẽŋa n dẽŋɛ sɛla woo bɔna, la de la ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ sɛla woo ken bɔna a zẽ'am.

ref: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
text: Ẽŋa n de a nẽrba n de a ĩyã la zuudãana. Ẽŋa n de sɛla woo pɔspɔsɩ dãana, ẽŋa n de pɔspɔsɩ dãana n vo'oge dee basɛ kũm tɩ a dɛna sɛla woo nẽŋadãana.

ref: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
text: La paagɛ la Nawẽnnɛ yɛm tɩ a basɛ tɩ ẽŋa n ãn se'em na wuu, Azezi mẽ ãna bɛla.

ref: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
text: Dee botɩ la doose la Azezi tɩ sɛla woo, la ẽŋa naagɛ taaba, la de la Azezi n ki kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo tɩ a zɩɩm yese la ĩyã, n botɩ sũ-mã'asʋm bɔna sɛla n boe tẽŋa, la saazuum wuu, la Nawẽnnɛ tẽŋasʋka.

ref: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
text: La yãma mẽ daan zãagɛ mɛ la Nawẽnnɛ, ya daan de la bɛ'ɛba ya pʋtẽ'e-be'ero, la ya tõon-be'ero la ĩyã.

ref: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
text: La lɛɛlɛ wã, Nawẽnnɛ naagɛ ya mɛ la ẽŋa, a Dayʋa n lebge nẽrsaala ki la ĩyã, tɩ a tarɩ ya sẽŋɛ ka ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam la pʋpeelem, tɩ ya ka tara yelle, tɩ dõrga kana.

ref: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
text: Bɛla, dẽnɩ tɩ ya ken bɔ sɩra zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ, da basɛ tɩ sɛla zãagɛ ya la kõ-yẽlga la tɩ ya wõm tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla la. La de la kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa tɩ ba mõolɛ bɔ nẽrsaalba wuu n boe dũnia zuo la. Mam Apolɩ de Nawẽnnɛ tõntõnna tɩ m mõolɛ la kõ-yẽl-ẽŋa. Apolɩ n tõm se'em bɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba

ref: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
text: Lɛɛlɛ wã, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, mam n nãmsrɩ bɔ'ɔra yãma la ĩyã. Mam n nãmsrɩ wã de la Krisi nãmsgɔ n deege dɛna mam nãmsɛ bɔ a nẽrba n de a ĩyã la.

ref: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n looge mam tɩ m dɛna Azezi nẽrba tõntõnna mõolɛ a yetɔga la wuu bɔ yãma.

ref: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
text: Yetɔg-ẽŋa sʋgɛ mɛ yʋʋma yʋʋma, zamãana wuu wa paam zĩna, la lɛɛlɛ wã a yãŋa puke mɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba.

ref: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ tɩ a basɛ tɩ a nẽrba la bãŋɛ yel-ẽŋa n daan sʋgɛ la na'am pãŋa n ãn sõŋa zo'oge se'em bu-zãŋsɩ tẽŋasʋka. Yel-ẽŋa n sʋgɛ la de la Krisi boe la ya lɛ, botɩ ya wʋn yẽ na'am pãŋa tɩ ya tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la a zẽ'am.

ref: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
text: La de la ẽŋa yelle tɩ tõma mõolɩ, kã'ana nẽra woo, dee zãsna nẽra woo la yɛm tɩ tɩ botɩ nẽra woo masɛ sɛla woo pʋam Krisi doosgo pʋam ka ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam.

ref: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
text: La de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ mam tõnna dee mõrgra. La de la Krisi pãn-kãtɛ tɩ a bɔ mam zozo'e la n botɩ mam tõnna bɛla.

ref: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
text: Mam boorɩ tɩ ya bãŋɛ la mam n mõrgɛ tõnna se'em yãma ĩyã, la nẽr-sɛba n boe Laodise, la nẽr-sɛba wuu n nãn ka yẽ mam na nifo la ĩyã.

ref: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
text: Mam mõrgrɩ tɩ ya sũure n keŋe tɩ ya lagɩm taaba tara nõŋlʋm, dee tara yɛm zozo'e, tɩ ya bãŋɛ sɩra sõŋa sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ yelle n sʋgɛ n de Krisi la.

ref: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
text: La de la ẽŋa n tarɩ yɛm la bãŋrɛ wuu n sʋgɛ n tarɩ yõorɔ zozo'e.

ref: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
text: Mam yele ya wãna tɩ nẽra n da wa tɔgɛ nõ-yẽlʋm yetɔga pã'asɛ ya.

ref: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
text: Baa mam n zãagɛ la yãma la, mam yɛm boe la ya mɛ, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, mam yẽ tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ dolɩ sore sõŋa sõŋa, la yan bɔ Krisi sɩra zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ la. Tõma tarɩ vɔm mɛ Krisi zẽ'am

ref: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
text: Bɛla, yãma n sakɛ tɩ Azezi-krisi de la ya Zuudãana la, bɔna-ya la ẽ lɛ,

ref: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
text: zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ tɩa yẽga n kẽ tẽŋa zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ se'em na, ken bɔ-ya sɩra la ya sũure wuu wʋ ban zãsʋm ya se'em na, la ya pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ zozo'e.

ref: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
text: Guuse-ya tɩ nẽra da dɩkɛ bãŋrɛ zãsŋɔ la yɛm yooro n de nẽrsaalba sisgo, la dũnia wã yɛla pã'asɛ ya, ba ka ze'ele Krisi zẽ'am.

ref: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
text: La yãma n lagɩm na ẽ na, ya tarɩ sɛla woo mɛ tɩ la seke. Ẽŋa n de kɛ'ɛndõma, la pãnsɩ dõma wuu Zuudãana.

ref: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
text: Ban daan mise ya ko'om pʋam na, la ãn wʋ ba lagɩm ya mɛ la Krisi laagɛ. La yãma mẽ lagɩm na ẽ mɛ vo'oge, yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ pãŋa n botɩ Krisi vo'oge sɩra la ĩyã.

ref: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
text: Yãma daan ãn wʋ ya ki mɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am ya tõon-be'ero ĩyã, la ban ka dɔgɛ ya tɩ ya wãta dɛna Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la ĩyã. La Nawẽnnɛ botɩ ya lagɩm na Krisi mɛ vɔa, basɛ ya tõon-be'ero wuu taalɛ.

ref: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
text: Tõma daan sɩ'ɩsɛ la Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ, tõm tõon-be'ero n pa'alɛ tɩ tõma masɛ la sɩbgrɛ. La ban ka Krisi kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo la, Nawẽnnɛ basɛ yel-ẽŋa taalɛ mɛ, tɩ a ka le bɔna tõma zuo.

ref: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
text: A botɩ pãnsɩ dõma wuu, la kɛ'ɛndõma wuu pãŋa sã'am mɛ, ẽŋɛ ba yãnnɛ nẽrba wuu nẽŋam pa'alɛ tɩ Krisi tã'agɛ ba mɛ kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo.

ref: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
text: Bɛla, da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra le bɔ ya sisgo la sɛla tɩ ya diti, bɩɩ sɛla tɩ ya yũuri, bɩɩ yʋʋnɛ yʋʋnɛ kibsa, bɩɩ wõr-paalsɩ de'eŋo, bɩɩ vo'osgo dabsa yelle.

ref: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
text: Bõn-bãma de la sɛla n sẽm na mãmsgɔ mã'a, la sɛla la mẽŋa de la Krisi.

ref: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
text: Da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra n ɩtɩ a mẽŋa wʋ a de la sik-m-mẽŋa dãana dee pʋ'ʋsra malɛkadõma, pã'asɛ ya yetɩ yãma n ɩtɩ sɛla de la zãŋa. Nẽr-ẽŋa dãana yetɩ Nawẽnnɛ n puke sɛla pa'alɛ ẽŋa, la a pa'alɩ la a mẽŋa zãŋa, se'ere n soe la, la de la nẽrsaalba pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ a tarɩ.

ref: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
text: A ka lagɩm na Krisi n de Zuudãana la. Krisi n de zuugo sõŋra ĩyã la wuu sɛla woo pʋam, tɩ kõb-suglsi, la zĩila botɩ ĩyã la zẽ'esɩ to'oto'ore toŋe taaba bɩta wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em. Vɔm kɛka, la vɔm paalga yelle

ref: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
text: Yãma lagɩm na Krisi ki mɛ, tɩ a botɩ dũnia yɛla ka le tara pãŋa la ya lɛ. Bẽm tɩ ya ɩta wʋ dũnia wã n ken sɔna ya, basɛ tɩ ba le mõrgra ya tɩ ya sakra sisgo bãna wã n yetɩ:

ref: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
text: «Da dɩkɛ, da leme, da kalʋm»?

ref: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
text: Sisgo bãma de la bõn-sɛba n sã'anɩ la ĩyã. Ba de la nẽrsaalba sisgo la ba zãsŋɔ.

ref: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
text: Sisgo la zãsŋɔ bãna ãn wʋ yɛm tõoma la, ba pa'alɩ la pʋ'ʋsgɔ sore n ɩtɩ la yɛmleego, la sik-m-mẽŋa n dagɩ sɩra, la ĩyã nãmsgɔ yelle. La ba ka tã wʋn sõŋɛ nẽra tɩ a yõkɛ a mẽŋa la nẽrsaala yɛm n boorɩ se'em n de be'em na.

ref: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
text: Yãma lagɩm na Krisi vo'oge mɛ, bɛla ɛɛra-ya bõn-sɛba n boe Nawẽnnɛ yire, zẽ'e-sɛka tɩ Krisi zĩ Nawẽnnɛ zʋʋgɔ la.

ref: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ Nawẽnnɛ yire yelle pakɛ ya, da basɛ-ya tɩ dũnia yɛla pakɛ ya.

ref: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
text: Se'ere n soe la, ya ki mɛ, la ya vɔm boe la Krisi lɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am.

ref: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
text: La Krisi n de tɩ vɔm na sãn wa puke, ya wʋn po naagɛ la ẽ puke la a na'am pãŋa.

ref: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
text: Bɛla, basɛ-ya dũnia wã pʋtẽ'e-be'ero n de yalsɩ tõoma, la tõon-dẽgrɔ, la yalsɩ ɩrgɔ yɛmleego, la be'em yɛmleego, la nõŋɛ bõnɔ zozo'e. Nẽra n nõŋɛ bõnɔ zozo'e ãn wʋ nẽr-sɛba n kãabrɩ baga dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ la.

ref: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
text: La de la tõon-bãma n isgri Nawẽnnɛ sũure, tɩ a sɩbgra nẽr-sɛba n zagsrɩ a nõorɛ la.

ref: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
text: Yãma n daan vɔa tõon-be'ero pʋam na, ya mẽ daan ɩtɩ la bɛla.

ref: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
text: La lɛɛlɛ wã, basɛ-ya bõn-bãma wuu. Basɛ-ya sũ-isgre, la sũ-yĩire, la pʋtʋʋlgɔ, la taaba tʋʋrɛ, la yetɔg-yaalsɩ mẽ ka le masɛ tɩ ba yese ya nõorʋm.

ref: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
text: Da parna-ya bɔ'ɔra taaba. Yãma basɛ yãma n daan ãn se'em na mɛ la a yel-ɩrɛ,

ref: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
text: dee teege tara ãsʋm paalga. La de la Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ ya teege tara ãsʋm ẽŋa, dee malgra ẽ tɩ a ãna wʋ a mẽŋa la, tɩ ya wʋn tã'agɛ bãŋra ẽŋa sõŋa sõŋa pa'asra.

ref: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
text: Nẽr-sɛba n tarɩ ãsʋm paalga wã, la sãn dɛna Zifdõma, bɩɩ bu-zãŋsɩ, bɩɩ sɛba n wã, la sɛba n ka wã, bɩɩ sɛba nini n ka pike, la weem nẽrba, bɩɩ yamsɩ, la sɛba n dagɩ yamsɩ, welgre ka le bɔna ba tẽŋasʋka. La de la Krisi mã'a n gãnnɩ sɛla woo, dee sɔna a nẽrba wuu.

ref: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
text: Yãma de la nẽr-sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge, a nõŋɛ ya mɛ, welge ya to'ore tɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba. Bɛla, zɔta-ya taaba ninbãalga, ɩta taaba sõŋa, sikra ya mẽŋa, dee tara sũ-bʋgsʋm, la sũ-mã'arɛ.

ref: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
text: Da isgra ya sũure la taaba, nẽra sãn ẽŋɛ ya tuuge, basɛ-ya ẽ taalɛ wʋ Zuudãana n basɛ ya tõon-be'ero taalɛ se'em na.

ref: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
text: Lan gãnnɩ wuu, tara-ya nõŋlʋm, tɩ ẽŋa n wʋn botɩ ya lagɩm taaba tara nõ-yẽnnɛ sõŋa sõŋa.

ref: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ Krisi sũ-mã'asʋm la sɔna ya sũure, Nawẽnnɛ wi ya tɩ ya tara la sũ-mã'asʋm ẽŋa, lagɩm taaba dɛna ayɩla. Mina-ya yel-sõnnɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ.

ref: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ Krisi yetɔga la bɔna la ya lɛ sõŋa sõŋa. Tɩ ya tara yɛm zozo'e zãsna taaba, dee kã'ana taaba. Yõona-ya Nawẽnnɛ yõoma, yõona-ya yõom-sõma buuri wuu tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa bɔ ya la ya sũure wuu, pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
text: Bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ ya ɩtɩ, la sãn dɛna la tõoma bɩɩ yetɔga, ɩta-ya la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ, dee pʋ'ʋsra tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ ĩyã. Krisi nẽrba n wʋn vɔa se'em ba yiɛ pʋam

ref: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
text: Pɔgsɩ, sakra-ya ya sɩrba wʋ lan masɛ tɩ la ãna se'em Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.

ref: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
text: Sɩrba, nõŋɛ-ya ya pɔgba, da tɔ-ya la ba.

ref: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
text: Kɔma, sakra ya dɔgrɩba nõorɛ sɛla woo pʋam, tɩ la de la bɛla n ãn Zuudãana sũure yẽlʋm.

ref: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
text: Sɔdõma, da ɩta-ya sɛla n wʋn basɛ tɩ ya kɔma sũure yĩige, tɩ ba bʋraanɛ da bo'oge.

ref: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
text: Yamsɩ, sakra-ya sɛba n soe ya dũnia wã zuo sɛla woo pʋam, da ɩta-ya bɛla ba nifum mã'a tɩ ba pẽgɛ ya. Tõnna-ya la ya sũure wuu yãma n nannɩ Zuudãana la ĩyã.

ref: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
text: Sɛla woo tɩ ya ɩtɩ, ɩta-ya la ya sũure wuu, wʋ ya ɩtɩ bɔ'ɔra la Zuudãana la, la dagɩ nẽrsaalba ĩyã,

ref: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
text: yãma n mi tɩ ya wʋn to'oge la yɔɔrɔ tɩ Zuudãana la bĩŋe tɩ a bɔ a nẽrba la ĩyã. La de la Krisi n de Zuudãana la tɩ ya tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra.

ref: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
text: Nẽr-sɛka n ɩtɩ sɛla n ka masɛ, a wʋn to'oge yel-ɩrɛ n ka masɛ yɔɔrɔ, se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ ka bɔkrɩ nẽrba.

ref: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
text: La sãn dɛna yãma n de zuudãandõma la, ɩta-ya sɛla n ãn sõŋa, la sɛla n masɛ bɔ'ɔra ya yamsɩ la. Mina-ya tɩ yãma mẽ tarɩ la Zuudãana n boe saazuum. Kã'aŋɔ, la ba'asgɔ yetɔga

ref: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
text: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ da basɛ, mõrgɛ-ya la pʋ'ʋsgɔ, pʋ'ʋsra-ya ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
text: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya tõma mẽ ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ sore tɩ tɩ mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga la pa'alɛ nẽrba Krisi yelle n daan sʋgɛ la. La de la yel-ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ mam bɔna yʋ'a deem.

ref: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
text: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ tɩ m tã'agɛ tɔgɛ yel-ẽŋa vẽelga vẽelga wʋ lan masɛ tɩ m tɔgɛ se'em na.

ref: When you are with unbelievers, always make good use of the time.
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Azezi la tẽŋasʋka, dɩkɛ-ya fol-sɛka tɩ ya tarɩ la wuu tõm sõŋa.

ref: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
text: Basɛ-ya tɩ ya yetɔga ãna sõŋa wakatɛ wuu tara yẽlʋm wʋ yaarʋm na, dee bãŋɛ yan wʋn lerge nẽra woo se'em tɩ la masɛ.

ref: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
text: La sãn dɛna mam yelle, tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ Atisiki n de Zuudãana tõntõnna n de sɩra dãana, n lagɩm na mam tõnna Zuudãana tõoma la, wʋn yele ya mam yelle wuu.

ref: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
text: Mam tõm ẽ ya zẽ'am na bɛla ĩyã, tɩ ya bãŋɛ tõma yɛla n ãn se'em, dee tɩ a wʋn keŋe ya sũure.

ref: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
text: Mam tõm na ẽŋa, la A'onezim n ze'ele yãma zẽ'am, a de la tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ n de sɩra dãana. Ba wʋn yele ya bõn-sɛba wuu n ɩtɩ kalam.

ref: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
text: Aristarkɩ n lagɩm na mam bɔna yʋ'a deem na pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Amarkɩ n de Abarnabasɩ sõogɔ la mẽ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Mam põn dẽŋɛ pa'alɛ yãma, yan wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em a ĩyã mɛ, a sãn wa'am ya zẽ'am, ya to'oge ẽ sõŋa.

ref: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
text: Azezi sɛka tɩ ba wi'iri tɩ Azustusi la mẽ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Nẽr-bãna mã'a n de Zifdõma n lagɩm na mam tõnna Nawẽnnɛ so'olʋm tõoma. Bãma n de nẽrba n bɔ mam bʋraanɛ.

ref: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
text: A'epafrasɩ n de ya nẽra la pʋ'ʋsra ya. Ẽŋa n de Azezi-krisi tõntõnna la mõrgrɩ mɛ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ ya yelle ka basra tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, dɛna nẽrba n bɩ sɛla woo pʋam sakɛ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em wuu.

ref: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
text: Mam bɔ'ɔrɩ ya a kaseto tɩ a mõrgrɩ mɛ zozo'e yãma yelle, la Laodise dõma, la Hiyerapolisi dõma yelle.

ref: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
text: Tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ Aluki n de logtore, la Ademasɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

ref: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
text: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya tɩ sɔbiisi la n boe Laodise la, la Animfa, la Azezi nẽrba n lagsrɩ a yire la.

ref: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
text: Ya sãn karẽŋɛ gõŋɔ wã ba'asɛ, ya basɛ tɩ ba ken karẽŋɛ ẽ bɔ Azezi nẽrba n boe Laodise la. La yãma mẽ karẽŋɛ Laodise dõma n wʋn bɔ ya gõn-sɛka la.

ref: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
text: Yele-ya Arsipi tɩ a bɩsɛ tõon-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana bɔ ẽ na yelle sõŋa, a tõm ẽ sõŋa sõŋa ba'asɛ.

ref: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
text: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ wã la m mẽŋa nu'ugo, mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Tẽra-ya mam n boe yʋ'a deem na yelle. Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

ref: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
text: Mam Apolɩ, la Asilvẽ, la Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma sɛba n de tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi nẽrba n boe Tesaloniki. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm. Tesaloniki dõma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em

ref: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
text: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ wakatɛ wuu a yel-sõnnɛ ya wuu ĩyã, dee tẽra ya yelle tɩ pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam ka gɔ'ɔra.

ref: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
text: Tõma tẽrɩ ya yelle tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam, yãma n bɔ sɩra tõnna se'em, la yãma n tarɩ nõŋlʋm tõnna zozo'e se'em, dee ken tẽra yãma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla tɩ ya bɔ sɩra, zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam ka bigsra la yelle.

ref: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
text: Tɩ sɔbiisi, tõma mi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõŋɛ ya mɛ looge ya tɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba.

ref: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
text: Tõma n daan tarɩ kõ-yẽlga la wa'am wa mõolɛ bɔ ya la, la ka de yetɔga mã'a, la de la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa pãŋa. La tõma daan mi tɩ tõma n tɔgɛ se'em na de la sɩra. Yãma mi tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma n vɔa se'em yãma sõŋrɛ ĩyã.

ref: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
text: La yãma ɩtɩ la tõma, la tɩ Zuudãana n ɩtɩ se'em na, la baa yãma n to'oge kõ-yẽlga la yẽ nãmsgɔ zozo'e la, ya tarɩ ẽ mɛ la sũ-yẽlga n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa zẽ'am.

ref: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
text: Bɛla, yãma de la sɛba tɩ Masedʋanɩ, la Akayi so'olʋm nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Azezi sɩra la wʋn bɩsra, ɩta yãma n ẽŋɛ se'em na.

ref: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
text: Zuudãana Azezi kõ-yẽlga la ze'ele la yãma zẽ'am saagɛ Masedʋanɩ, la Akayi, la, la dagɩ bilam mã'a, zẽ'esɩ wuu nẽrba wõm yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em mɛ, tɩ la põn ka le dɛna tɩ tɔgɛ.

ref: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
text: Nẽrba la wuu tɔgrɩ pa'ala yãma n daan to'oge tõma sõŋa se'em, basɛ baga, dee dɔla Nawẽnnɛ tõnna bɔ'ɔra ẽŋa n de vɔm, la sɩra dãana,

ref: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
text: dee gu'ura a Dayʋa Azezi n wʋn ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire wa'am. La de la ẽŋa n daan ki, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ botɩ a vo'oge, ẽŋa n yetɩ a fãagɛ tɔ Nawẽnnɛ sũ-isgre n sẽm na pʋam.

ref: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
text: M sɔbiisi, yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ tõma n daan wa'am ya zẽ'am na, la dagɩ zãŋa.

ref: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
text: La ya ken mina tɩ ba daan nãmsɛ tõma mɛ dee tʋ tõma Filipi tẽŋa, dee tɩ tõma yãŋa wa'am yãma zẽ'am Tesaloniki. La Nawẽnnɛ daan bɔ tõma bʋraanɛ mɛ, tɩ tõma mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya, baa nãmsgɔ la n daan zo'oge la.

ref: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
text: Tõma n pa'alɩ pa'alg-sɛba la dagɩ tuure, bɩɩ pʋtẽ'e-be'ero pa'algɔ. La tõma ka ɩtɩ yɛmkẽgsɩga pã'asra nẽrba.

ref: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
text: La de la Nawẽnnɛ n bɩsɛ tɩ tõma masɛ tɩ a dɩkɛ a kõ-yẽlga la ẽŋɛ tõma nu'usum. Bɛla, tõma ka mõolɩ tɩ la ẽŋɛ nẽrsaalba sũure yẽlʋm, tõma mõolɩ tɩ la ẽŋɛ la Nawẽnnɛ n vẽesrɩ mina tɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ n ãn se'em na sũure yẽlʋm.

ref: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
text: Yãma mi sõŋa tɩ tõma ka dɩkɛ nõ-yẽlʋm pã'asɛ nẽrba, la tõma ka dɩkɛ kõnkomã'asʋm tɔgɛ tɩ tɩ to'oge sɛla, Nawẽnnɛ n de tõma kaset-dãana.

ref: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
text: Tõma ka ɛ pẽka nẽrsaalba zẽ'am, tõma ka ɛ yãma zẽ'am, bɩɩ nẽrba basɛba zẽ'am.

ref: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
text: La tõma daan tarɩ nõorɛ mɛ, tõma n de Krisi Tõntõnɩba la ĩyã, la tõma daan ka ẽŋɛ bɛla. Tõma daan tarɩ la sũ-bʋgsʋm ya zẽ'am, wʋ pɔka n bɩsrɩ a kɔma yelle sõŋa se'em na.

ref: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
text: Tõma n nõŋɛ ya la ĩyã, tɩ tõma daan mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am na bɔ ya. La, la dagɩ bɛla mã'a, tõma daan sakɛ mɛ tɩ dɩkɛ tɩ vɔm bɔ ya, tõma nõŋɛ ya mɛ halɩ zozo'e.

ref: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
text: M sɔbiisi, yãma tẽrɩ tõma n daan tõm nãmsɛ se'em, tõma n daan mõolɩ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya la. Tõma daan tõm na wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tõma daan ka boorɩ tɩ tõma dia yelle dɛna nãmsgɔ bɔ ya nẽra baa ayɩla.

ref: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
text: Yãma mi tõma n daan boe yãma sɛba n bɔ sɩra zẽ'am na, tõma yel-ɩrɛ n ãn se'em, la Nawẽnnɛ mẽ mi mɛ. Tõma yel-ɩrɛ daan ãn na sõŋa sõŋa, masɛ tɩ dõrga kana.

ref: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
text: Yãma mi tɩ tõma daan ãn wʋ sɔ n ãn se'em la a kɔma la, yãma nẽra woo ĩyã.

ref: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
text: Tõma keŋe ya sũure mɛ, bɔ ya bʋraanɛ, pa'alɛ ya yetɩ ya dɔla so-sɛka n masɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm, ẽŋa n wi ya tɩ ya kẽ a so'olʋm pʋam po dita na'am.

ref: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
text: Tõma n daan mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya la, ya daan to'oge ẽ, sakɛ tɩ la de la kõ-yẽlga n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am, a ka ze'ele nẽrsaalba zẽ'am. Asɩra, la de la Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga n boe yãma sɛba n bɔ sɩra la sũure pʋam tõnna. Bɛla tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu bõn-ẽŋa ĩyã.

ref: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
text: M sɔbiisi, Nawẽnnɛ nẽr-kʋʋŋɔ n dolɩ Azezi-krisi n boe Zude tẽnsɩ pʋam n yẽ nãmsgɔ sɛba la, yãma mẽ yẽ la nãmsgɔ bãma. Yãma buuri la n nãmsrɩ yãma se'em na, Zifdõma mẽ nãmsɛ ba nẽr-sɛba n dolɩ Azezi-krisi la bɛla.

ref: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
text: Bãma n daan kʋ Zuudãana Azezi, la Nawẽnnɛ nõtɔ'ɔsrɩba, dee mẽ nãmsɛ tõma. Ba ɩtɩ la sɛla n ka ãn Nawẽnnɛ sũure yẽlʋm, ba de la nẽrba wuu bɛ'ɛba.

ref: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
text: Ba gu'uri tõma mɛ tɩ tɩ da mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ bu-zãŋsɩ tɩ ba yẽ fãarɛ. Bɛla tɩ ba tõnna tõon-be'ero pa'asra wakatɛ wuu. La ba'asgɔ, Nawẽnnɛ sũ-isgre boe ba zuo. Apolɩ boorɩ tɩ a sẽŋɛ ka kaagɛ Tesaloniki dõma

ref: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
text: M sɔbiisi, lan daan pẽrgɛ tɩ tõma ze'ele ya zẽ'am fõrgɛ wakatɛ fẽe la, tɩ ka le yẽta taaba la nini, la tõma pʋtẽ'era ken bɔna la ya lɛ mɛ, tɩ yãma sɩa tara tõma, tɩ tõma mõrgra bɔɔra tɩ tɩ le yẽ ya.

ref: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
text: Bɛla tɩ tõma daan bɔɔra tɩ tɩ leme ya zẽ'am. La mam mẽŋa Apolɩ mõrgɛ mɛ nõorɛ faa tɩ m leme ya zẽ'am, tɩ Asũtãana gu tõma.

ref: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
text: La de la yãma tɩ tõma tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura, yãma n wʋn bɔ tõma sũ-yẽlga, la de la yãma n wʋn botɩ tõma yẽ nã'asgɔ tõma Zuudãana Azezi nẽŋam a lemŋo daarɛ.

ref: You alone are our glory and joy!
text: La de la bɛla, yãma ĩyã tɩ tõma wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ la sũ-yẽlga.

ref: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
text: Bɛla tɩ tõma ka le tãna wʋn zĩ'ire, tɩ tõma tẽ'esɛ tɩ la ãn sõŋa tɩ tõma mã'a bɔna Atɛnɩ tẽŋa,

ref: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
text: dee tõm tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ n de Nawẽnnɛ tõntõnna n lagɩm na tõma mõola Krisi kõ-yẽlga la, tɩ a wa'am wa bɔ ya bʋraanɛ, tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam.

ref: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
text: Tɩ nãmsgɔ sɛka n nãmsrɩ ya la da basɛ tɩ ya nẽra baa ayɩla bʋraanɛ bo'oge Nawẽnnɛ sore la doosgo pʋam. Yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ la de la pẽrgrɛ tɩ tɩ nãmsɛ.

ref: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
text: Tõma n daan boe la yãma la, tõma daan dẽŋɛ yele ya yetɩ, tɩ wuu wʋn yẽ nãmsgɔ mɛ. La ya mi tɩ la de la bõn-ẽŋa n bɛla n wa'am.

ref: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
text: Bɛla tɩ mam ka tãna wʋn zĩ'ire, tɩ mam tõm Atimõtɩ tɩ a wa'am wa bãŋɛ yãma n ãn se'em Azezi sore doosgo la pʋam, mam zotɩ mɛ tɩ Asũtãana wʋn pã'asɛ ya tɩ tɩ tõoma la lebge zãŋa.

ref: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
text: La lɛɛlɛ wã tɩ Atimõtɩ ze'ele ya zẽ'am leme wa'am, a tarɩ la kõ-yẽlga wa bɔ tõma, a pa'alɛ tõma la yãma n bɔ sɩra se'em, la yãma n tarɩ nõŋlʋm se'em, dee yetɩ ya ken tẽ'esra tõma yelle mɛ sõŋa sõŋa bɔɔra tɩ ya yẽ tõma, wʋ tõma n boorɩ tɩ tɩ yẽ yãma se'em na.

ref: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
text: Bɛla m sɔbiisi, yãma n bɔ sɩra se'em na keŋe tõma sũure mɛ tõma toogo, la tõma nãmsgɔ la pʋam.

ref: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
text: Lɛɛlɛ wã, tõma le vɔa la sũ-yẽlga, yãma n ze kãŋkãŋɛ Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam na.

ref: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
text: Tõma ka mi pʋ'ʋsgɔ sɛka tɩ tõma wʋn pʋ'ʋsɛ Nawẽnnɛ ya ĩyã, sũ-yẽlga sɛka tɩ yãma bɔ tõma a nẽŋam na ĩyã.

ref: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
text: Tõma sosrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ la tɩ sũure wuu, yʋ'ʋŋɔ la wʋntɛɛŋa, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ le yẽ ya, sõŋɛ ya la sɛla n pɔ'ɔgɛ ya Azezi doosgo la pʋam pa'asɛ.

ref: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
text: Tõma Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn bɔ tɔ sore tɩ tɩ wa'am ya zẽ'am.

ref: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
text: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn basɛ tɩ ya nõŋlʋm taaba ĩyã, la ya nõŋlʋm nẽrba wuu ĩyã pa'asra zozo'e wʋ tõma n nõŋɛ ya se'em na.

ref: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
text: A wʋn bɔ ya bʋraanɛ tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ a sore la zuo la pʋpeelem, ka tara dõrga tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam, wakat-sɛka tɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi wʋn leme wa'am la a nẽrba wuu la.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
text: Sɛla n pa'asɛ, m sɔbiisi, yãma zãsʋm tõma zẽ'am mɛ yãma n wʋn ɩta se'em paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm. Yãma põn ɩta la bɛla. La tõma kã'anɩ ya mɛ, dee bɛlna ya la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya malɩn ẽŋɛ gãŋɛ bɛla.

ref: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
text: Yãma mi bõn-sɛba tɩ tõma daan to'oge tɩ Zuudãana Azezi zẽ'am pa'alɛ ya tɩ ya ɩta la.

ref: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ tɩ ya ãna se'em n wãna: Welge-ya to'ore dɛna pʋpeelem dõma, dee yõkɛ ya mẽŋa da tõnna yalsɩ tõoma.

ref: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
text: Da basɛ-ya tɩ yalsɩ tõoma yɛmleego tara ya, wʋ sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ n ɩtɩ se'em na.

ref: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
text: Yel-ẽna pʋam, nẽra da kãn tõm a tadãana sɛla n ka ãn sõŋa, bɩɩ fã sɛla n de a bõnɔ. Tɩ daan põn dẽŋɛ yele ya, dee kã'an ya mɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn sɩbgɛ sɛba n tõnnɩ tõon-be'ero bãma mɛ.

ref: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
text: Nawẽnnɛ ka looge to tɩ tɩ tõnna tõon-dẽgrɔ, a looge to tɩ tɩ welge la to'ore tara pʋpeelem.

ref: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
text: Bɛla, nẽr-sɛka n zagsɛ pa'algɔ ẽna, a ka zagsɛ nẽrsaala, a zagsɛ la Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la.

ref: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
text: La sãn dɛna yãma n wʋn nõŋɛ sɔbiisi se'em yelle, la ka le dɛna tɩ gʋlsɛ bɔ ya. Nawẽnnɛ põn zãsʋm yãma ya wʋn nõŋɛ taaba se'em mɛ.

ref: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
text: La yãma sɩrɩ nõŋɛ ya sɔbiisi wuu n boe Masedʋanɩ so'olʋm wuu la bɛla. La tõma kã'anɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya malɩn ẽŋɛ gãŋɛ bɛla pa'asɛ.

ref: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
text: Mõrgɛ ya mẽŋa vɔa la sũ-mã'asʋm, la ya bɩsra ya mẽŋa tõoma yelle, tõnna-ya la ya mẽŋa nu'usi dita, wʋ tõma n daan yele ya se'em na.

ref: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
text: Ɩta-ya bɛla, tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ la basɛ tɩ ya yẽ nã'asgɔ nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ na zẽ'am. La ya da zɛ gu'ura tɩ nẽra bɔ ya sɛla. Zuudãana Azezi lemŋo

ref: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
text: M sɔbiisi, tõma boorɩ tɩ ya bãŋɛ la sɩra nẽr-sɛba n ki la yelle, tɩ ya sũure da sã'am wʋ nẽr-sɛba n ka tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla la.

ref: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
text: Tõma n bɔ sɩra tɩ Azezi ki mɛ, dee vo'oge la, bɛla tõma ken bɔ sɩra mɛ tɩ sɛba n dolɩ Azezi dee ki la, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn botɩ ba bɔna la Azezi.

ref: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
text: Zuudãana zãsŋɔ n wãna tɩ tõma yetɩ tɩ pa'alɩ ya: Wakat-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana la lemnɩ la, tõma sɛba n ken vɔa Zuudãana lemŋo daarɛ la kãn dẽŋɛ sɛba n ki la Zuudãana zẽ'am.

ref: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
text: Se'ere n soe la, nõorɛ n wʋn bɔ, tɩ malɛkadõma naba tɔgɛ ke'enke'em, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ benkonne peebe, tɩ Zuudãana mẽŋa ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire sige, tɩ sɛba n dolɩ Azezi dee ki la dẽŋɛ vo'oge.

ref: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
text: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ lagɩm bãma, la tõma sɛba n ken vɔa la zẽkɛ sawara pʋam tɩ tɩ tʋ'ʋsɛ Zuudãana la saazuum, tɩ tɩ bɔna la Zuudãana la lɛ wakatɛ wuu.

ref: Encourage each other with these words.
text: Bɛla, kɛŋra-ya taaba sũure la yetɔg-bãna.

ref: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
text: M sɔbiisi, la ka le dɛna tɩ gʋlsɛ ya pa'alɛ wakatɛ, la dabs-sɛba tɩ bõn-bãma wʋn ẽŋɛ.

ref: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
text: Yãma mẽŋa põn mina sõŋa mɛ tɩ Zuudãana lemŋo la daarɛ wʋn ãna wʋ nayiga n ẽn wa'am yʋ'ʋŋɔ la.

ref: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
text: Nẽrba sãn wa yɛta tɩ: «Laafɛ la sũ-mã'asʋm boe», wakat-ẽŋa tɩ toogo wʋn wa'am di'ige ba wʋ pɔka virgre toogo la, la ba kãn yãŋɛ põsɛ.

ref: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
text: La yãma, m sɔbiisi, yãma dagɩ nẽrba n boe lika pʋam tɩ Zuudãana la daarɛ wʋn wa di'ige ya wʋ nayiga la.

ref: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
text: Yãma wuu de la peelem nẽrba, yãma tõoma tõnnɩ la wʋntɛɛŋa. Tõma tõoma ka tõnnɩ yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tõma dagɩ lika nẽrba.

ref: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
text: Bɛla, tɩ da gĩsra-ya wʋ nẽrba basɛba la, tɩ nẽegɛ-ya mãasʋm tara tɩ mẽŋa sõŋa.

ref: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
text: Sɛba n gĩsri, gĩsri la yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tɩ sɛba n yũuri dãam bugra, bugra yʋ'ʋŋɔ.

ref: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
text: La tõma n de wʋntɛɛŋa nẽrba la, tɩ tara tɩ mẽŋa sõŋa. La tɩ bɔ Azezi sɩra, dee tara nõŋlʋm wʋ kuto fuugo tɩ sʋdaaga dɩkɛ pĩ a yõ'ogɔ tɩ la gu'ura ẽ zɛbrɛ pʋam na. Dee basɛ tɩ fãarɛ la tɩ ya tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la, ãna wʋ kuto zuu-wannɛ gu'ura ya.

ref: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Nawẽnnɛ ka looge to tɩ a sũ-isgre sã'am tɔ, a looge to tɩ tɩ yẽ la fãarɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi ĩyã.

ref: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
text: Ẽŋa n ki tɩ ĩyã, tɩ a lemŋo daarɛ, tɩ sãn vɔa mɛ bɩɩ tɩ sãn ki mɛ, tɩ wʋn bɔna la ẽ lɛ.

ref: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
text: Bɛla, bɔ'ɔra-ya taaba bʋraanɛ, sõŋra taaba ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam, wʋ yãma n põn ɩta se'em na. Kã'aŋɔ, la ba'asgɔ yetɔga

ref: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
text: M sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya nanna sɛba n tõnnɩ ya tẽŋasʋka la, sɛba tɩ Zuudãana looge tɩ ba bɔna ya nẽŋa pa'ala ya Azezi sore la pʋam, dee kã'ana ya la.

ref: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
text: Ẽŋɛ-ya sɛla n pa'alɩ tɩ yãma nannɩ ba mɛ, nõŋɛ ba zozo'e ba tõoma la ĩyã. Tara-ya sũ-mã'asʋm la taaba.

ref: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
text: M sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya kã'ana sɛba n ka boorɩ tɩ ba tõm na, dee bɔ'ɔra sɛba n ka tarɩ bʋraanɛ la bʋraanɛ, dee sõŋra sɛba n ka tarɩ pãŋa la, la ya mã'ara ya sũure la nẽra woo.

ref: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
text: Guuse-ya tɩ nẽra da lebse a tadãana be'em, be'em ĩyã, mõrgɛ-ya ɩta taaba sõŋa, la nẽrba wuu sõŋa wakatɛ wuu.

ref: Always be joyful
text: Tara-ya sũ-yẽlga daarɛ woo.

ref: and never stop praying.
text: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu da basɛ.

ref: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
text: Sɛla woo pʋam pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ. Nawẽnnɛ boorɩ tɩ ya ɩta la bɛla Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam.

ref: Don't turn away God's Spirit
text: Da gu'ura-ya Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa tõoma.

ref: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
text: Magra-ya sɛla woo bɩsra la ãn se'em, to'oge sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

ref: and don't have anything to do with evil.
text: Dee lɔkra-ya yel-sɛba wuu n de be'em.

ref: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n de sũ-mã'asʋm dãana la mẽŋa wʋn basɛ tɩ ya dɛna ẽŋa mã'a nẽrba tara pʋpeelem. A wʋn gu ya ĩyã, la ya sɩa, la ya yɛm wuu tɩ ya kãn tara dõrga tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo daarɛ.

ref: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n looge ya la de la sɩra dãana, a wʋn ẽŋɛ bɛla.

ref: Friends, please pray for us.
text: M sɔbiisi, pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ'ɔra tɔ.

ref: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
text: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu la nõŋlʋm.

ref: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
text: Mam sosrɩ ya la Zuudãana yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya karẽŋɛ gõŋɔ ẽna wã tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu wõm.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
text: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

ref: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Mam Apolɩ, la Asilvẽ, la Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma sɛba n de tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi nẽrba n boe Tesaloniki.

ref: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
text: Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm. Tesaloniki dõma ze la kãŋkãŋɛ nãmsgɔ pʋam

ref: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
text: M sɔbiisi, tõma masɛ mɛ tɩ tɩ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ daarɛ woo a yel-sõnnɛ yãma ĩyã. La ãn sõŋa mɛ tɩ tõma ɩta bɛla, se'ere n soe la, yãma n bɔ Azezi sɩra la sẽnnɩ nẽŋa mɛ zozo'e, tɩ yãma nẽra woo nõŋlʋm taaba ĩyã pa'asra.

ref: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
text: Bɛla tɩ tõma tɔgra yãma yelle Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba lagsgɔ zẽ'a woo la sũ-yẽlga. Se'ere n soe la, yãma mõrgɛ mɛ zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam ka basra, baa nẽrba n nãmsrɩ ya, la toogo n paarɩ ya la.

ref: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
text: Bɛla pa'alɛ tɩ Nawẽnnɛ diti sarɩya la sɩra. Se'ere n soe la, yãma n nãmsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ so'olʋm yelle se'em wã, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn yetɩ ya masɛ tɩ ya kẽ a so'olʋm na pʋam.

ref: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
text: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ sɛla n masɛ, a wʋn botɩ sɛba n nãmsrɩ yãma la yẽ nãmsgɔ,

ref: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
text: dee basɛ tɩ yãma sɛba n nãmsrɩ la, lagɩm na tõma vo'ose wakat-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana Azezi wʋn ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire wa'am, la a malɛkadõma n tarɩ pãn-kãtɛ,

ref: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
text: la bug-zɩlɩsɩ wa sɩbgɛ sɛba n zagsɛ Nawẽnnɛ dee ka sakɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi kõ-yẽlga la.

ref: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
text: Ba wʋn yẽ la sɩbgrɛ n de sã'aŋɔ n ka ba'asrɩ. La ba wʋn zãagɛ mɛ la Zuudãana kãn yẽ a na'am pãn-kãtɛ la,

ref: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
text: wakat-sɛka tɩ a wʋn wa'am na. Daar-ẽŋa, a wʋn wa'am mɛ wa to'oge pẽka la nã'asgɔ a mẽŋa nẽrba n bɔ ẽ sɩra la zẽ'am, la yãma po bɔna ba pʋam mɛ, yãma n sakɛ a kõ-yẽlga la tɩ tõma tɔgɛ bɔ ya la ĩyã.

ref: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
text: Bɛla ĩyã tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu ya ĩyã, tɩ a basɛ tɩ ya ãna sõŋa masɛ wʋ ẽŋa n wi ya tɩ ya ãna se'em na. La a wʋn bɔ ya pãŋa tɩ ya ɩta bõn-sõma sɛba wuu tɩ ya boorɩ tɩ ya ẽŋɛ, dee basɛ tɩ yãma n bɔ sɩra tõnna tõon-sɛba la tõm ba'asɛ.

ref: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
text: Bɛla tɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yʋ'ʋrɛ wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ ya zẽ'am, tɩ yãma mẽ yẽ nã'asgɔ a zẽ'am. Bɛla wuu de la Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
text: La sãn dɛna tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo, la tõma n wʋn wa lagsɛ taaba a zẽ'am na yelle, m sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ

ref: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
text: tɩ ya da basɛ tɩ ya yɛm yɔɔra tɩ dabeem tara ya, ya sãn wõm tɩ nẽrba yetɩ Zuudãana la lemŋo daarɛ paagɛ mɛ. Baa nẽra sãn yele ya yetɩ la de la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n pa'alɛ ẽŋa, bɩɩ a sãn yetɩ tõma n tɔgɛ, bɩɩ a sãn yetɩ tõma n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ, da kãn sakɛ-ya.

ref: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
text: Da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra pã'asɛ ya, baa lan de se'em wuu. Lan dẽŋɛ daar-ẽŋa n wʋn wa'am, dẽnɩ tɩ nẽrba zozo'e isge tulge zɛbra la Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ nẽr-sɛka n de tõon-be'ero dãana la wʋn wa'am wa puke a mẽŋa, ẽŋa n de nẽr-sɛka n wʋn sã'am.

ref: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
text: A wʋn sise bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ nẽrba nã'asrɩ, dee yetɩ ba de la wẽnnɛ, a wʋn zẽkɛ a mẽŋa mɛ gãnna bõn-bãma wuu. Halɩ, a wʋn põn sẽŋɛ ka kẽ la Nawẽnnɛ deego la pʋam zĩ'ire yetɩ ẽŋa de la Nawẽnnɛ.

ref: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
text: Mam n daan ken bɔna yãma zẽ'am na, mam daan yele ya bɛla wuu mɛ. Yãma ka tẽrɩ?

ref: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
text: La yãma mi tɩ sɛla n boe gu'ura tɩ tõon-be'ero dãana la nãn ka puke, halɩ tɩ wakatɛ la wʋn wa paagɛ.

ref: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
text: Tõon-be'ero pãŋa n sʋgɛ põn tõnna mɛ. La sɛka n nãn gu'uri ẽ na, wʋn wa fõrgɛ mɛ dee basɛ folle.

ref: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
text: Bɛla tɩ tõon-be'ero dãana la yãŋa wʋn puke. La tõma Zuudãana Azezi n wʋn leme wa'am tɩ a nõorɛ sapebsʋm kʋ ẽ. La a lemŋo la na'am pãŋa wʋn sã'am a pãŋa fasɩ.

ref: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
text: La sãn dɛna tõon-be'ero dãana la n wʋn wa'am na, a wʋn tara la Asũtãana pãŋa ɩta bõn-yãlma la yel-kɩrsɩ, la yɛla buuri zozo'e n de pã'asgɔ.

ref: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
text: A wʋn tõm na be'em buuri to'oto'ore pã'asɛ nẽr-sɛba n wʋn yẽ sã'aŋɔ la, ban zagsɛ ka nõŋɛ sɩra to'oge ẽ wʋn yẽ fãarɛ la ĩyã.

ref: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
text: Ban ka sakɛ sɩra la, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ basɛ tɩ ba pʋtẽ'era botɩ ba tuuge sakɛ põmpɔrŋɔ.

ref: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
text: Bɛla tɩ nẽr-sɛba wuu n ka sakɛ sɩra, dee bɔɔra tõon-be'ero la wʋn yẽ sarɩyadia n de sã'aŋɔ. Nawẽnnɛ looge ya tɩ ya yẽ la fãarɛ

ref: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
text: La ãn sõŋa tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ wakatɛ wuu yãma n de tɩ sɔbiisi tɩ tɩ Zuudãana nõŋɛ la ĩyã. Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ looge ya la halɩ pɔspɔsɩ, tɩ a Sɩa botɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba tara pʋpeelem, dee sakɛ sɩra yẽ fãarɛ.

ref: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: La de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ Nawẽnnɛ doose la tõma kõ-yẽlga la wi ya tɩ ya po yẽ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi na'am pãŋa la.

ref: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
text: Bɛla, m sɔbiisi, mõrgɛ-ya zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ, tara yel-sɛba tɩ tõma zãsʋm ya, bɩɩ gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ bɔ ya la.

ref: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
text: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi, la tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ n nõŋɛ tɔ dee ẽŋɛ tɩ yel-sõnnɛ bɔ tɔ bʋraanɛ n ka ba'asrɩ, dee botɩ tɩ tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura bõn-sõma sɛba tɩ tɩ sakɛ la.

ref: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
text: A wʋn keŋe ya sũure, dee bɔ ya pãŋa tɩ ya ẽŋɛ sɛla wuu n ãn sõŋa, la ya tɔgɛ sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

ref: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
text: Sɛla n deege, m sɔbiisi, sose-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ, tɩ tɩ Zuudãana kõ-yẽlga la ken saagɛ pa'asɛ dee tɩ nẽrba pẽgra ẽ, wʋ la ãn se'em yãma zẽ'am na.

ref: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
text: Ken sose-ya ẽ tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ la nẽr-wẽensɩ, la nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ, se'ere n soe la, la dagɩ nẽrba wuu n sakɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la.

ref: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
text: La Zuudãana la de la sɩra dãana, a wʋn botɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, dee gu'ura ya tɩ be'em dãana la da yãŋɛ ya.

ref: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
text: Zuudãana la ĩyã tõma bɔ yãma sɩra mɛ, tõma mi tɩ ya ɩtɩ la tõma n yele ya se'em na, la ya wʋn ken ɩta la bɛla.

ref: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
text: Zuudãana la wʋn basɛ tɩ ya tara Nawẽnnɛ nõŋlʋm, dee mõrgɛ zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ Krisi la. Kã'aŋɔ zẽyãgsɩ ĩyã

ref: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
text: M sɔbiisi, tõma yetɩ ya la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya zãagɛ ya mẽŋa la sɔbiisi sɛba wuu n de zẽyãgsɩ vɔa yooryooro ka dɔla pa'algɔ sɛba tɩ tõma pa'alɛ ya la.

ref: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
text: Yãma mẽŋa mi sõŋa tɩ la masɛ mɛ tɩ ya ɩta tõma n daan ɩtɩ se'em na. Tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma daan ka tarɩ zẽyãgrɛ,

ref: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
text: la tõma ka diti nẽra dia zãŋa, tõma daan tõnnɩ na wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ nãmsra zozo'e ka bɔɔra tɩ tõma dia yelle dɛna nãmsgɔ bɔ ya nẽra baa ayɩla.

ref: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
text: Tõma n daan ɩtɩ bɛla la, la dagɩ tɩ tõma ka tarɩ la sore tɩ tɩ sose sõŋrɛ ya zẽ'am, tõma daan tõnnɩ tɩ pa'alɛ ya, tɩ ya mẽ ɩta la bɛla.

ref: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
text: Tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma daan yele ya yetɩ: «Sɛka n ka boorɩ tɩ a tõm, a da di.»

ref: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
text: La tõma wõm tɩ nẽrba basɛba n boe ya zẽ'am dɛna zẽyãgsɩ vɔa yooryooro, dee kẽ'era nẽrba yɛla pʋam.

ref: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
text: Tõma yetɩ nẽr-bãma mɛ, dee kã'ana ba la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ba yõkɛ ba mẽŋa mõrgɛ tõm bɩsɛ ba mẽŋa yelle.

ref: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
text: La sãn dɛna yãma, m sɔbiisi, da kãn targɛ-ya la tõon-sõma ɩrgɔ.

ref: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
text: Nẽra sãn ka sakɛ bõn-sɛba tɩ tõma yele ya gõŋɔ wã pʋam na, ya bãŋɛ a dãana lɔkra ẽ, tɩ yãnnɛ yõkɛ ẽ.

ref: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
text: La ya da dɩkɛ ẽ tɩ a lebge ya bɛ, kã'an ya ẽ wʋ ya sɔbia. Ba'asgɔ yetɔga

ref: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
text: Zuudãana mẽŋa n de sũ-mã'asʋm dãana la wʋn bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm wakatɛ woo la sɛla woo pʋam. Zuudãana wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
text: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

ref: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
text: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã. La de la Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra, la Azezi-krisi tɩ tɩ tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la, n bɔ mam nõorɛ tɩ mam dɛna a Tõntõnna.

ref: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
text: Mam gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra la Atimõtɩ n lebge mam mẽŋa bia Azezi-krisi doosgo la pʋam. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fʋ yel-sõnnɛ, dee zoe fʋ ninbãalga, dee bɔ fɔ sũ-mã'asʋm. Sɛba n zãsnɩ põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ

ref: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
text: Mam n daan we'esɩ Masedʋanɩ dee yele fʋ se'em na, ken weege Efɛɛzɩ tẽŋa yele nẽr-sɛba n zãsnɩ põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ la tɩ ba da zãsʋm.

ref: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
text: Yele ba tɩ ba basɛ kʋrʋm kʋrʋm dõma sɔlma, la yaabdõma deto kãalgɔ n ka tarɩ ba'asgɔ. Bõn-bãma tarɩ la nõke'ene sẽna, dee ka sõŋra tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tõoma sẽnna nẽŋa. Nẽrba n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n botɩ a tõoma la sẽnna nẽŋa.

ref: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
text: La nẽrba basɛba basɛ bõn-bãma mɛ, dee tɔgra yetɔg-yaalsɩ,

ref: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
text: bɔɔra tɩ ba dɛna Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ karẽnsãandõma, dee ka wõnna ba mẽŋa n yetɩ se'em, bɩɩ yel-sɛba tɩ ba zãsnɩ na võorɛ.

ref: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
text: Tɩ mi tɩ Amoyisi lɔɔ ãn sõŋa, ba sãn dɩkɛ ẽ tõm wʋ lan masɛ se'em.

ref: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
text: Tõma mi tɩ lɔɔ la ka ẽŋɛ sɛba n masɛ la ĩyã, a ẽŋɛ la nẽr-sɛba n ka sakrɩ lɔɔ, la sɛba n ka sakrɩ nõorɛ la ĩyã, la sɛba toogo n ka boe la Nawẽnnɛ, la tõon-be'ero dõma, la nẽr-sɛba n pɔ'ɔrɩ Nawẽnnɛ dee ka nanna bõn-sɛba wuu n de Nawẽnnɛ bõnɔ, la sɛba n kʋʋrɩ ba sɔdõma, la ba madõma, la sɛba n de nẽr-kʋʋrba ĩyã,

ref: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
text: la sɛba n ɩtɩ yalsɩ, la bʋra-sɛba n gã la taaba, la pɔg-sɛba n gã la taaba, la sɛba n yõgrɩ nẽrba kɔɔsra, la põmpɔrndõma, la sɛba n pɔtɩ dee ka ɩta ban yele se'em na, la nẽr-sɛba n ɩtɩ sɛla woo n sɩ'ɩsrɩ sɩra kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã.
