ref: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
text: Kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa ze'ele la sũ-yẽlga dãana Nawẽnnɛ n tarɩ na'am pãŋa la zẽ'am, ẽŋa n dɩkɛ ẽ ẽŋɛ mam nu'usum tɩ m mõolɛ. Apolɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ

ref: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
text: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi n bɔ mam pãŋa, la ẽn bãŋɛ tɩ mam de sɩra dãana looge mam tɩ m tõm a tõonɛ wã.

ref: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
text: Baa mam n daan pɔ'ɔrɩ a yʋ'ʋrɛ, nãmsra a nẽrba, dee tʋʋra ẽ na, a zoe mam ninbãalga mɛ. Se'ere n soe la, mam daan ka bãŋɛ mam ɩtɩ sɛla, mam n daan ka bɔ Azezi sɩra la ĩyã tɩ mam ɩta bɛla.

ref: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
text: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi la ẽŋɛ mam a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ zozo'e, botɩ mam bɔ ẽ sɩra, dee tara a nõŋlʋm.

ref: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
text: Yetɔg-sɛka tɩ mam yetɩ m tɔgɛ wã de la sɩra, la a masɛ mɛ tɩ nẽra woo to'oge ẽ sõŋa: «Azezi-krisi wa'am dũnia zuo wa fãagɛ la tõon-be'ero dõma.» La mam n de tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna ba wuu.

ref: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
text: La ẽn zoe mam ninbãalga la, la de la Azezi-krisi n pa'alɛ a sũ-mã'arɛ zozo'e la mam n de tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna la, tɩ la wʋn dɛna makrɛ pa'alɛ nẽr-sɛba n wʋn wa bɔ ẽ sɩra la, tɩ a wʋn ẽŋɛ a sũ-mã'asʋm la ba, dee bɔ ba vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ.

ref: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n de naba wakatɛ wuu, n ka kiiri, tɩ nini ka yẽta ẽ, ẽŋa ayɩla mã'a sɔna pẽka la nã'asgɔ wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

ref: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
text: M bia Atimõtɩ, mam zãsŋɔ n wãna tɩ mam dɩkɛ ɩta fʋ nu'usum, wʋ ban daan to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɔgɛ fʋ yelle se'em na: Basɛ tɩ yetɔg-bãma bɔ fʋ pãŋa, tɩ fʋ zɛbɛ zɛbrɛ sõŋa,

ref: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
text: ken bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra, dee ɩta sɛla tɩ fʋ mi fʋ sũure pʋam tɩ la ãn sõŋa. Nẽrba basɛba zagsɛ bɛla mɛ, tɩ bõn-ẽŋa basɛ tɩ ba ka le dɔla Azezi sore.

ref: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
text: Nẽr-bãma pʋam, Ahimẽnɩ, la Alɛgsãndrɩ n daan boe mĩ, tɩ mam daan basɛ ba la Asũtãana tɩ ba yõgɛ yɛm, da le pɔ'ɔra Nawẽnnɛ.

ref: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
text: Mam yetɩ ya mɛ lan gãnnɩ wuu, tɩ ya sɔsra dee kã'ara Nawẽnnɛ, dee pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ nẽrba wuu ĩyã.

ref: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
text: Sɔsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ'ɔra na'adõma, la sɛba wuu n tarɩ ke'eŋo, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ vɔa la laafɛ, tɩ dãaŋɔ da bɔna, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore sõŋa, tɩ tɩ yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa.

ref: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
text: Bõn-ẽna n ãn sõŋa bɔ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra dee ãna a sũure yẽlʋm.

ref: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
text: Ẽŋa n boorɩ tɩ nẽrba wuu yẽ fãarɛ, dee bãŋɛ sɛla n de sɩra.

ref: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
text: Nawẽnnɛ ayɩla mã'a n boe, la nẽra ayɩla mã'a n mẽ boe nẽrba la Nawẽnnɛ tẽŋasʋka naara ba taaba, ẽŋa de la Azezi-krisi n lebge nẽrsaala la.

ref: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
text: Bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ daan looge mam tɩ m dɛna Azezi Tõntõnna dɩkɛ yel-ẽna wã mõolɛ, dee zãsʋm bu-zãŋsɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra tɩ ba bɔ ẽ sɩra. Mam tɔgrɩ la sɩra, mam ka parnɩ.

ref: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
text: Bɛla mam boorɩ tɩ zẽ'a woo bʋraasɩ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ, ba zẽkɛ ba nu'usi la pʋpeelem pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ, ba da tara sũ-isgre bɩɩ nõke'ene.

ref: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
text: Pɔgsɩ mẽ yɛɛra futo wʋ lan masɛ, tɩ la da dɛna pa'al-m-mẽŋa bɩɩ yãnnɛ. Ba da ɛɛra tɩ ba nẽnnõm dɛna zuto lʋa, bɩɩ sãlma lɔgrɔ, bɩɩ kug-sõma lɔgrɔ, la futo ligri n zo'oge yɛa.

ref: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
text: Ba basɛ tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa wʋ pɔgsɩ n nannɩ Nawẽnnɛ n masɛ tɩ ba ɩta se'em.

ref: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
text: La masɛ tɩ zãsŋɔ wakatɛ pɔgsɩ ãna sĩm, dee sakra nõorɛ.

ref: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
text: Mam ka bɔ pɔgsɩ nõorɛ tɩ ba zãsna, bɩɩ ba sɔna bʋraasɩ, ba ãna sĩm.

ref: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
text: La de la Adam tɩ Nawẽnnɛ daan dẽŋɛ nãam, dee yãŋa nãam Awa.

ref: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
text: La, la dagɩ Adam tɩ Asũtãana daan pã'asɛ, a daan pã'asɛ la Awa yãŋɛ, tɩ a sɩ'ɩsɛ Nawẽnnɛ nõorɛ.

ref: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
text: La baa pɔgsɩ n nãmsrɩ dee dɔgra la, ba tã wʋn yẽ fãarɛ, ba sãn mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ doosgo pʋam, tara nõŋlʋm la pʋpeelem, dee guusra ba mẽŋa.

ref: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
text: Yetɔg-ẽna tɩ mam yetɩ m tɔgɛ wã de la sɩra, nẽra sãn bɔɔra tɩ a dɛna Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba nẽŋadãana, la de la tõon-sõŋɔ tɩ a boorɩ tɩ a tõm.

ref: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
text: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽŋadãana dɛna nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, la a dɛna nẽra n tarɩ a mẽŋa sõŋa, dee tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, a dɛna nẽra tɩ ba nannɩ, la a dɛna nẽra n ɩtɩ nẽrba sãanɔ, dee tãna wʋn zãsʋm nẽrba.

ref: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
text: A da dɛna nẽra n dɩkɛ a mẽŋa bɔ dãam, a da dɛna zɛbzɛbra, a dɛna sũ-bʋgsʋm dãana, da nõŋɛ girgiri, la a da nõŋɛ bõnɔ.

ref: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
text: A dɛna nẽra n bɩsrɩ a yir-dõma yelle sõŋa, tɩ a kɔma sakra a yetɔga, nã'asra ẽ sɛla woo pʋam.

ref: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
text: Nẽra sãn ka tãna bɩsra a mẽŋa yir-dõma yelle, a wʋn ẽŋɛ la wãne bɩsɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba yelle?

ref: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
text: A da dɛna nẽr-paalga Azezi sore la pʋam, tɩ a da zẽkɛ a mẽŋa tɩ ba wa di a sarɩya wʋ Asũtãana la.

ref: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
text: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ mẽ tɔgra a yelle yetɩ a de la nẽr-sõŋɔ. Tɩ ba da wa pɔ'ɔgɛ ẽ, tɩ yãnnɛ yõkɛ ẽ tɩ a lui Asũtãana bẽrgɔ pʋam.

ref: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
text: Ba dɛna nẽrba n tarɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n daan sʋgɛ, tɩ a puke pa'alɛ tɩ la, ɩta sɛla woo tɩ ba mi ba sũure pʋam tɩ la masɛ mɛ.

ref: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
text: Dẽnɩ tɩ ba dẽŋɛ makɛ ba bɩsɛ, ba sãn ka tara dõrga, tɩ ba yãŋa tõm yel-bɩsrɩba tõoma la.

ref: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
text: La ba pɔgba mẽ masɛ tɩ ba dɛna la nẽrba tɩ ba nannɩ, ba da dɛna nẽrba n tɔgrɩ nẽrba be'em, ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa, dee dɛna sɩra dõma sɛla woo pʋam.

ref: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
text: Dẽnɩ tɩ yel-bɩsra dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, dee tãna bɩsra a kɔma, la a yir-dõma yelle sõŋa.

ref: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
text: Yel-bɩsrɩba sɛba n tõnnɩ ba tõoma sõŋa yẽtɩ nã'asgɔ mɛ, la ba wʋn yẽ bʋraanɛ zozo'e Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam. Bõn-kãtɛ sɛka tɩ Nawẽnnɛ pa'alɛ tõma

ref: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
text: Mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ la kãn yuuge dee tɩ mam wa'am fʋ zẽ'am, la mam gʋlsɛ wãna bɔ'ɔra fɔ,

ref: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
text: tɩ mam sãn yuuge, fʋ tã'agɛ bãŋɛ nẽra n wʋn ãna se'em Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba tẽŋasʋka, nẽr-sɛba n de vɔm dãana Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa nẽrba n tarɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra wʋ zẽerɛ n sõŋrɩ deego se'em na.

ref: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
text: Tɩ wuu mi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n daan sʋgɛ tɩ a dɩkɛ pa'alɛ tɔ a doosgo pʋam na, de la bõn-kãtɛ. Bõn-kãtɛ ẽŋa de la: Krisi n daan lebge nẽrsaala. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa pa'alɛ tɩ a de la sɩra dãana. Tɩ malɛkadõma bɩsɛ ẽ. Tɩ ba mõolɛ a yelle buuri wuu tẽŋasʋka. Tɩ nẽrba bɔ ẽ sɩra. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zẽkɛ ẽ la na'am pãŋa sẽŋɛ a yire.

ref: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
text: Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa tɔgɛ mɛ vẽelga vẽelga yetɩ, dũnia ba'asgɔ wakatɛ, nẽrba basɛba wʋn basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo, dee dɔla sɛla n de pã'asgɔ, la kʋlkã'arsɩ põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ.

ref: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
text: Ba de la põmpɔrndõma, la pʋlibsum dõma, tɩ ba zãsna põmpɔrŋɔ dee tɩ ba zuto ka zɛɛra.

ref: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
text: Nẽr-bãma zãsnɩ nẽrba yetɩ, pɔgsɩ da ɛlla sɩrba, tɩ bʋraasɩ mẽ da dita pɔgba, la ba sisra dia basɛba da dita. La de la põmpɔrŋɔ, Nawẽnnɛ nãam bõn-bãma tɩ nẽr-sɛba n sakɛ ẽŋa mina sɩra la pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ dee dita ba.

ref: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
text: Se'ere n soe la, sɛla woo tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam ãn sõŋa mɛ. Sɛla sɛla ka boe n de fʋ zagsɛ, fʋ sãn pʋ'ʋsɛ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
text: Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga, la pʋ'ʋsgɔ n basrɩ tɩ sɛla woo ãna sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am. Azezi tõntõn-sõŋɔ

ref: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
text: Pa'alɛ sɔbiisi la bɛla, tɩ fʋ wʋn dɛna Azezi-krisi tõntõn-sõŋɔ, n to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɩ fʋ bɔ sɩra la, tɩ a pa'asra fʋ pãŋa, dee dɔla zãsŋɔ n de sɩra la sõŋa.

ref: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
text: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la sɔlma n ka tarɩ võorɛ, dee keŋe fʋ mẽŋa dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sõŋa.

ref: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
text: Bɛla, tõma n tõnnɩ nãmsra mõrgra la, la de la tõma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura vɔm dãana Nawẽnnɛ n de nẽrsaalba wuu Fãagra la ĩyã, la a de la sɛba n bɔ ẽ sɩra la Fãagra gãnna.

ref: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
text: Pa'alɛ ba, dee zãsʋm ba bõn-bãna.

ref: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
text: Da basɛ tɩ nẽra zɛɛn fɔ, fõn de bõnbɩ'a la ĩyã, basɛ tɩ fʋ yetɔga, la fʋ yel-ɩrɛ, la fʋ nõŋlʋm, la fõn bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em, la fʋ pʋpeelem ãna sõŋa, tɩ la pa'alɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba, bãma n wʋn vɔa se'em.

ref: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
text: Mõrgɛ karẽŋra Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ pa'ala nẽrba, bɔ'ɔra ba bʋraanɛ, dee zãsna ba halɩ tɩ m wa wa'am.

ref: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
text: Da basɛ bɔ'a la tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ fɔ, tɩ ba daan to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɔgɛ a yelle, tɩ kẽma la daan dɩkɛ nu'usi paglɛ fʋ zuo pʋ'ʋsɛ bɔ fʋ la.

ref: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
text: Tõm tõon-bãna sõŋa, dɩkɛ fʋ mẽŋa bɔ tõoma la, tɩ nẽrba wuu wʋn yẽ fõn sẽnnɩ nẽŋa se'em.

ref: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
text: Guuse fʋ mẽŋa la fʋ vɔm, la fʋ zãsŋɔ la. Mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ ɩta bɛla wuu. Fʋ sãn ɩta bɛla, tɩ fʋ wʋn fãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa, la sɛba n selsrɩ fʋ la.

ref: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
text: Bʋra-yã'aŋa sãn ẽŋɛ sɛla, da tãsɛ ẽ, kã'an ẽ wʋ fʋ sɔ la. Kã'an kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ wʋ fʋ sɔbiisi la,

ref: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
text: la fʋ kã'an pɔg-yã'asɩ wʋ fʋ madõma la, dee kã'an pug-sarsɩ wʋ fʋ tãpa la, la pʋpeelem. Pɔkõpa yelle

ref: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
text: Nanna pɔkõpa sɛba n boe ba yɩla mã'a la, dee sõŋra ba.

ref: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
text: Pɔkõorɛ sãn tara kɔma bɩɩ yɩɩsɩ, bãma n masɛ tɩ ba bɩsra ba mẽŋa yir-dõma yelle, ba bɩsra ba dɔgrɩba la yelle wʋ ba dɔgrɩba la n daan bɩsrɩ ba yelle se'em na, bɛla n ãn Nawẽnnɛ sũure yẽlʋm.

ref: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
text: Pɔkõ-sɛka n boe ayɩla mã'a ka tara nẽra nẽra la, a te'ege la Nawẽnnɛ pʋ'ʋsra sɔsra wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ.

ref: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
text: La pɔkõorɛ sɛka n eerɩ tõnna a yɛm n boorɩ se'em, ẽŋa põn ki mɛ baa la ẽn ken vɔa la.

ref: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
text: Kã'an ba bɛla, tɩ nẽra da zɛrgɛ ba.

ref: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
text: Nẽra sãn ka bɩsra a yir-dõma yelle, lan gãnnɩ a dee-dõma yelle, ẽŋa dãana zagsɛ sɛla tɩ tɩ bɔ sɩra la mɛ, la a de la tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna sɛka n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ na.

ref: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
text: Pɔkõ-sɛka tɩ ba tã wʋn gʋlsɛ a yʋ'ʋrɛ pa'asɛ pɔkõpa gõŋɔ pʋam de la pɔkõ-sɛka n paagɛ yʋʋma pisyoobɩ, dee ele sɩra ayɩla mã'a.

ref: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
text: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽrba mina tɩ a de la tõon-sõma dãana, la a uge kɔma sõŋa, la a de la nẽra n ẽŋɛ nẽrba sãanɔ, la a peege Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba nãma, la a sõŋɛ nẽr-sɛba n nãmsɛ, dee dɛna nẽra n tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

ref: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
text: La sãn dɛna pɔkõ-sɛba n ka kʋrgɛ la, da gʋlsɛ ba yʋ'ʋra pɔkõpa la pʋam, se'ere n soe la, ba yɛm sãn wa bɔna bʋraasɩ pʋam, ba wʋn basɛ Krisi tõoma mɛ, dee bɔɔra tɩ ba ele.

ref: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
text: Sɛla n pa'asɛ, ba sãn gʋlsɛ ba, ba wʋn lebge la zẽyãgsɩ ɛɛra kaara yiɛ, la, la dagɩ bɛla mã'a, ba wʋn lebge la yetɔg-tɔgsrɩba kẽ'era nẽrba yɛla pʋam, dee tɔgra yetɔg-sɛba n ka narɩ ba tɔgɛ.

ref: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
text: Bɛla, mam boorɩ tɩ pɔkõ-sɛba n ka kʋrgɛ la le ele dɔgɛ kɔma, bɩsra ba yir-dõma yelle, da basɛ tɩ bɛ'ɛba yẽ folle tɔgɛ tɩ be'em.

ref: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
text: Se'ere n soe la, pɔkõpa basɛba põn wẽrgɛ mɛ basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore dee dɔla Asũtãana.

ref: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
text: Nẽra n bɔ Azezi sɩra sãn tara pɔkõpa a yire, a bɩsra ba yelle, a da dɩkɛ ba yelle basɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba zuo, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la tã'agɛ sõŋɛ pɔkõ-sɛba n ka tarɩ nẽra nẽra la. Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba kẽma yelle

ref: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
text: Wẽndeego nẽrba kẽma sãn bɩsrɩ nẽrba la yelle sõŋa, lan gãnnɩ wuu, sɛba n mõrgrɩ mõola dee zãsna Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la, ba wʋn yẽ la nã'asgɔ bʋyi.

ref: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
text: La gʋlsɛ Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ pʋam yetɩ: «Da ẽŋɛ lɔlga n tõnnɩ si pʋam nõorɛ yʋka», dee ken yetɩ: «La masɛ tɩ tõntõnna to'oge a yɔɔrɔ.»

ref: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
text: Nẽra sãn dõrɛ kẽma yetɩ a tõm na tõon-be'ero, da selse ẽ, sãn dagna nẽrba bayi bɩɩ batã n de kaset-dõma.

ref: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
text: La kẽma sãn tõm tõon-be'ero, fʋ kã'an ẽ Wẽndeego la pʋam nẽrba wuu nẽŋam, tɩ nẽrba basɛba la zoe dabeem.

ref: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
text: Mam yetɩ fʋ la Nawẽnnɛ, la Azezi-krisi, la malɛkadõma nẽŋam yetɩ, fʋ doose pa'algɔ bãna wã la sɩra, da bɔkra nẽrba.

ref: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
text: Da kãblɛ dɩkɛ fʋ nu'usi paglɛ nẽra zuo tɩ a tõm Nawẽnnɛ tõoma, da naagɛ la nẽra a tõon-be'ero pʋam, dɛna pʋpeelem dãana.

ref: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
text: Da le yũura ko'om mã'a, yũura vẽ fẽe fʋ pʋʋr-dõoma, la fʋ ĩyã n ka tarɩ pãŋa la ĩyã.

ref: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
text: Nẽrba basɛba tõon-be'ero puke mɛ lan dẽŋɛ ba wʋn di ba sarɩya. La nẽrba basɛba tõon-be'ero nãn ka puke, dee wʋn wa puke mɛ.

ref: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
text: Bɛla mẽ, tõon-sõma basɛba puke mɛ, la sɛba n sʋgɛ la ka tã wʋn sʋgɛ ka puke.

ref: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
text: Nẽr-sɛba n de yamsɩ la, dẽnɩ tɩ ba nanna ba zuudãandõma sõŋa, tɩ nẽra da pɔ'ɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ yʋ'ʋrɛ, la tɩ zãsŋɔ la.

ref: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
text: La yam-sɛba zuudãandõma n bɔ Azezi sɩra la, la ka masɛ tɩ ba ka nanna ba yetɩ bãma de la sɔbiisi. La de la ba tõn malɩn tõnna bɔ'ɔra ba gãnna bɛla, se'ere n soe la, sɛba tɩ ya tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra la, de la nẽrba n bɔ Azezi sɩra dee tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõŋɛ ba. Põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ, la ligri nõŋlʋm La de la bõn-bãna tɩ fʋ wʋn zãsʋm ba, dee kã'an ba tɩ ba ɩta.

ref: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Nẽra sãn zãsʋm zãsŋɔ ayẽma ka dɔla tõma Zuudãana Azezi-krisi sɩra yetɔga, bɩɩ ka dɔla zãsŋɔ sɛka n pa'alɩ tɩ wʋn ãna se'em Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo pʋam na,

ref: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
text: a tarɩ la pa'al-m-mẽŋa zo'oge dee ka mina sɛla sɛla, la a nõŋɛ la yetɔg-yaalsɩ la nõke'ene wẽ'a. Bõn-bãma n sẽm na ɩta sũure la tadãana bõnɔ, la a ka wõm taaba, la yʋ'ʋr-sã'aŋɔ, la tẽ'esɛ be'em bɔ'ɔra nẽrba,

ref: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
text: tɩ ba wẽ'era nõke'ene n ka ba'asrɩ la taaba, ban tarɩ yɛm be'ero dee ka tara yel-sɩra, dee tẽ'esra tɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo la de la sɛla n wʋn basɛ tɩ ba yẽ bõntarsõm na ĩyã.

ref: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
text: La de la sɩra tɩ nẽra n dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore sãn tara sũ-yẽlʋm la sɛla tɩ a tarɩ la, a yẽtɩ yõorɔ zozo'e mɛ.

ref: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
text: Tɩ ka tarɩ sɛla sɛla wa'am dũnia zuo, la tɩ mẽ kãn tã'agɛ tarɩ sɛla sɛla dũnia wã zuo fõrgɛ.

ref: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
text: Bɛla, tɩ sãn tara dia la futo, la seke mɛ.

ref: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
text: La sɛba n boorɩ tɩ ba yẽ bõntarsõm na kẽ'erɩ la yɛla pʋam, luta Asũtãana bẽrgɔ pʋam. Ba boorɩ la bõnɔ zozo'e n de yalnɛ la be'em, bõn-bãma n kẽ'esrɩ nẽrsaalba wõŋrɛ la sã'aŋɔ pʋam.

ref: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
text: Se'ere n soe la, ligri nõŋlʋm de la tõon-be'ero wuu yẽgrɛ. Nẽrba basɛba nõŋɛ la ligri bʋrgɛ dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore, nãmsɛ ba mẽŋa la toogo buuri zozo'e.

ref: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
text: La fõn de Nawẽnnɛ nẽra la, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la bõn-bãma, dee ɛ sɛla n masɛ, la Nawẽnnɛ sakrɛ, ken bɔ ẽ sɩra, ɛ nõŋlʋm, la sũ-mã'arɛ, la sũ-bʋgsʋm.

ref: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
text: Mõrgɛ mẽ mẽerɛ sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo la pʋam yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ, tɩ la de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge fo, tɩ fʋ daan tɔgɛ yetɔg-sõŋɔ yetɩ fõn bɔ Azezi sɩra nẽrba zozo'e nẽŋam na.

ref: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
text: Mam yetɩ fo Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ'ɔrɩ sɛla woo vɔm nẽŋam, la Azezi-krisi n daan tɔgɛ sɩra kaseto Apõnsɩ-pilatɩ nẽŋam na,

ref: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
text: yetɩ fʋ sakɛ pa'algɔ tɩ fʋ to'oge la, gʋrɛ ba sõŋa la pʋpeelem, tɩ dõrga kana, halɩ ka paagɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo.

ref: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
text: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn botɩ a leme wa'am na wakat-sɛka tɩ a looge la. Sũ-yẽlga dãana Nawẽnnɛ ayɩla mã'a n de na-kãtɛ, a de la na'adõma Naba, la zuudãandõma Zuudãana.

ref: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
text: Ẽŋa mã'a n vɔa wakatɛ wuu, a boe la peelem n nẽegɛ gãŋɛ pʋam tɩ nẽra ka tãna wʋn paagɛ mĩ, nẽra baa ayɩla ken ka yẽ ẽ, la nẽra nãn ka yẽtɩ ẽ. Ẽŋa n soe nã'asgɔ, la pãŋa n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

ref: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
text: Kã'an nẽr-sɛba n tarɩ dũnia wã bõntarsõm na yetɩ, ba da zẽkra ba mẽŋa, la ba da dɩkɛ ba te'ere te'ege bõntarsõm tɩ ba ka mĩ ban wʋn ãna se'em, ba te'ege Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ ẽŋa n bɔ'ɔrɩ tɔ sɛla woo tɩ la sɛkra sõŋa sõŋa tɩ tɩ ɩta sũ-yẽlga.

ref: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
text: Kã'an ba yetɩ, ba ɩta sõŋa, ba dɛna nẽrba n tõnnɩ tõon-sõma zozo'e, la ba dɛna nẽrba n bɔ'ɔrɩ, dee pʋta sɛla tɩ ba tarɩ bɔ'ɔra nẽrba la sũ-yẽlga.

ref: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
text: Bɛla tɩ ba wʋn lagsɛ bõntarsõm n ãn sõŋa kãn sã'am wakatɛ n sẽm na ĩyã, tɩ ba wʋn yẽ vɔm mẽŋa mẽŋa.

ref: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
text: Fõn Atimõtɩ, bɩsra sɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ gu'ule fo la, mõrgɛ zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yetɔg-yooro n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nõke'ene wẽ'a tɩ nẽrba tẽ'esrɩ tɩ la de la bãŋrɛ dee tɩ la dagna bɛla la.

ref: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
text: La nẽrba basɛba tarɩ la bõn-bãma tẽ'esɛ tɩ bãma tarɩ la bãŋrɛ, bʋrgɛ dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya a yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
text: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em, tɩ m mõolɛ vɔm sɛka tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bĩŋe nõorɛ tɩ a bɔ tɔ Azezi-krisi ĩyã la yelle.

ref: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
text: Mam gʋlsrɩ bɔ'ɔra la Atimõtɩ n lebge mam bi-nõŋrɛ la. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fɔ yel-sõnnɛ, dee zoe fʋ ninbãalga, dee bɔ fɔ sũ-mã'asʋm. Apolɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ Atimõtɩ bʋraanɛ

ref: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
text: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ, mam tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra ẽ mina m sũure pʋam tɩ la ãn sõŋa, wʋ mam yaabdõma n yʋʋn tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra ẽ se'em na. Mam tẽrɩ fʋ yelle m pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam yʋ'ʋŋɔ la wʋntɛɛŋa ka basra.

ref: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
text: Mam tẽrɩ fõn daan kellɩ la mɛ, tɩ mam bɔɔra tɩ m le yẽ fɔ, tɩ m wʋn tara sũ-yẽlga zozo'e.

ref: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
text: Mam tẽrɩ fõn bɔ Azezi sɩra la fʋ sũure wuu, wʋ fʋ ma-keko Aloyiizi, la fʋ ma A'enisi n daan dẽŋɛ bɔ Azezi sɩra se'em na. Mam mi tɩ fʋ ken bɔ sɩra la bɛla.

ref: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
text: La de la bɛla tɩ mam tẽera fɔ tɩ fʋ dɩkɛ bɔ'a la tɩ mam daan dɩkɛ m nu'usi paglɛ fʋ zuo tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ fɔ la, malɩn tõm gãŋɛ bɛla.

ref: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
text: Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la ka botɩ tɩ tara dabeem, a botɩ tɩ tara la pãŋa, la nõŋlʋm, la yõk-m-mẽŋa.

ref: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
text: Bɛla, da zoe yãnnɛ ka tɔgɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yelle. La fʋ ken da zoe yãnnɛ mam n boe yʋ'a deem Azezi-krisi kõ-yẽlga ĩyã la, lagɩm na mam sakɛ nãmsgɔ kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ fʋ pãŋa.

ref: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
text: Ẽŋa n fãagɛ tɔ, wi to tɩ tɩ dɛna a nẽrba, la dagɩ tɩn tõm tõon-sõma ĩyã, la de la a mẽŋa n boorɩ se'em, la a yel-sõnnɛ tɩ a ẽŋɛ bɔ tɔ Azezi-krisi ĩyã, halɩ lan dẽŋɛ dũnia pĩ'iluŋo.

ref: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
text: Yel-sõnnɛ ẽŋa yãŋa puke la Azezi-krisi wa'aŋɔ la ĩyã. Ẽŋa n fãagɛ tɔ, sã'am kũm pãŋa dee botɩ tɩ yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ a kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã.

ref: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n looge mam tɩ m dɛna Krisi Tõntõnna mõola a kõ-yẽlga, dee zãsna nẽrba.

ref: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
text: La de la kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã tɩ mam yẽta nãmsgɔ, la mam ka zotɩ yãnnɛ, se'ere n soe la, mam mi sɛka tɩ mam bɔ sɩra la mɛ, la mam mi m sũure pʋam tɩ a tarɩ pãŋa mɛ wʋn gu'ura sɛla tɩ a dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ mam nu'usum na sõŋa, halɩ ka paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ sarɩyadia daarɛ.

ref: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
text: Basɛ tɩ zãsŋɔ sɛka tɩ mam pa'alɛ fʋ la bɔna fʋ sũure pʋam tɩ fʋ bɩsra dɔla, ken bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra tara nõŋlʋm a doosgo pʋam.

ref: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
text: Tara zãsŋɔ sõma sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ fʋ nu'usum na la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n boe la tɩ lɛ la pãŋa.

ref: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
text: Fõn põn mina tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽr-sɛba n boe Azi so'olʋm la wuu basɛ mam mɛ, Afizɛlɩ la Ahɛrmozɛnɩ boe la nẽr-bãma pʋam.

ref: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
text: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn zoe A'onezifɔɔrɩ la a yir-dõma ninbãalga, se'ere n soe la, a ẽn bɔ'ɔra mam bʋraanɛ mɛ, dee ka zoe yãnnɛ la ban ba mam la bãnsɩ la.

ref: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
text: La ẽn wa'am Rom na, a mõ'ogɛ la nifo ɛ mam, halɩ wa yẽ mam.

ref: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
text: Sarɩyadia daarɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn zoe a ninbãalga. La fõn ken mina sõŋa sõŋrɛ sɛka wuu tɩ a sõŋɛ mam Efɛɛzɩ.

ref: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
text: M bia, keŋe fʋ mẽŋa yel-sõnnɛ sɛka tɩ Azezi-krisi ẽŋɛ bɔ tɔ la pʋam.

ref: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
text: Mam n zãsʋm fʋ bõn-sɛba nẽrba zozo'e nẽŋam na, dɩkɛ ba zãsʋm nẽrba n de sɩra dõma n mẽ tã wʋn dɩkɛ ba zãsʋm nẽrba basɛba.

ref: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
text: Fõn de Azezi-krisi tõntõn-sõŋɔ la, fʋ mẽ sakɛ nãmsgɔ wʋ sʋda-sõŋɔ n sakrɩ nãmsgɔ se'em na.

ref: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
text: Sʋdaaga sãn bɔɔra tɩ a tõm tɩ a kɛ'ɛma sũure ẽŋɛ yẽlʋm, a ka kẽ'esrɩ a mẽŋa yel-sɛba n dagɩ sʋdaasɩ yɛla pʋam.

ref: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
text: La de la kaara sɛka n tõm nãmsɛ n wʋn dẽŋɛ to'oge a bõnkɔɔla la yõorɔ.

ref: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
text: Wõm mam n yele se'em na võorɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn basɛ tɩ fʋ bãŋɛ sɛla woo võorɛ.

ref: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
text: Tẽra Azezi-krisi n de naba Adavidi yɩɩŋa la yelle, a ki dee vo'oge, wʋ kõ-yẽlga la tɩ mam mõolɩ la n yetɩ se'em na.

ref: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
text: La de la kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ mam nãmsra, halɩ tɩ ba ba mam na bãnsɩ, wʋ mam de la tõon-be'ero dãana la. La ba ka ba Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la.

ref: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
text: Bɛla ĩyã tɩ mam mõrgɛ wĩbra sɛla woo pʋam Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la tɩ a looge la ĩyã, tɩ ba mẽ yẽ fãarɛ Azezi-krisi ĩyã, dee po yẽ nã'asgɔ n ka ba'asrɩ.

ref: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
text: Yetɔg-ẽna wã de la sɩra: Tɩ sãn ki la ẽ, tɩ wʋn lagɩm na ẽ vɔa.

ref: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
text: La tɩ sãn mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, tɩ wʋn lagɩm na ẽ di na'am. Tɩ sãn zagsɛ yetɩ tõma ka mi ẽ, a mẽ wʋn zagsɛ yetɩ ẽŋa ka mi to.

ref: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
text: Tɩ sãn ka bɔna tɩ sɩra pʋam, ẽŋa ken dɛna la sɩra dãana, se'ere n soe la, a ka malɩn viira a yetɔga. Tõnna tɩ la paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm

ref: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
text: Tẽegɛ nẽrba la bõn-bãma, dee kã'an ba Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam tɩ ba da wẽ'era nõkɛ'ɛma yetɔg-biɛ yɛla, tɩ ba ka tarɩ yõorɔ baa fẽfẽe, dee sã'ana sɛba n selsrɩ la.

ref: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
text: Nargɛ pãŋa dɛna nẽra n paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm, la fʋ dɛna tõntõnna n ka zotɩ yãnnɛ la a tõoma, dee mõola sɩra kõ-yẽlga la lan masɛ se'em.

ref: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
text: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yetɔg-yooro n ka sõŋrɩ Nawẽnnɛ doosgo pʋam, nẽr-sɛba n tɔgrɩ yetɔg-bãma la zãarɩ mɛ la Nawẽnnɛ wɛ'ɛsa be'em pʋam.

ref: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
text: Ba yetɔga la ãn wʋ nõr-kɛka n diti ĩyã yãara se'em na. Ahimẽnɩ la Afilɛtɩ boe la nẽr-bãma pʋam.

ref: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
text: Bãma bʋrgɛ mɛ basɛ sɩra sore la, yetɩ kũm vo'ore la põn tole mɛ, ba ẽŋɛ bɛla basɛ tɩ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ sɩra la basɛba n lɛbra poorʋm.

ref: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
text: La baa bɛla, Nawẽnnɛ n looge sɛba la ken zɛ la kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ ẽbrɛ n tarɩ pãŋa la. Yetɔg-bãna n de dãalgɔ n pa'alɛ bɛla: «Zuudãana la mi sɛba n de a nẽrba mɛ», la «sɛba wuu n yetɩ bãma de la Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la, dẽnɩ tɩ ba basɛ tõon-be'ero».

ref: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
text: Yi-kãtɛ pʋam, dagɩ sãlma bɩɩ zũuro laasɩ mã'a n boe mĩ, dɔɔrɔ la yɔgrɔ laasɩ mẽ boe mĩ mɛ, tɩ ba dɩkɛ sãlma la zũuro laasɩ la tɩ ba dɛna tʋʋlʋm lɔgrɔ, dee dɩkɛ basɛba la tɩ ba dɛna daarɛ woo tõoma lɔgrɔ.

ref: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
text: Bɛla mẽ, nẽra sãn zãagɛ a mẽŋa la tõon-be'ero sɛba tɩ mam pa'alɛ wã, a wʋn ãna wʋ tʋʋlʋm lɔkɔ n welge to'ore tara yõorɔ bɔ Zuudãana, dee tãna wʋn tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

ref: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
text: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yel-yooro sɛba tɩ kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ boorɩ tɩ ba ɩta n de be'em na, dee ɛ sɛla n masɛ, ken bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra, ɛ nõŋlʋm, la sũ-mã'asʋm, dee lagɩm na nẽr-sɛba n pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana la pʋpeelem na.

ref: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
text: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nõke'en-yaalsɩ n ka tarɩ võorɛ la. Fõn mi tɩ ba tarɩ la zɛbrɛ sẽnna.

ref: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
text: La Zuudãana tõntõnna ka masɛ tɩ a zɛbra. La masɛ mɛ tɩ a dɛna nẽra n nõŋɛ nẽrba, tãna wʋn zãsʋm nẽrba la sũ-mã'asʋm.

ref: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
text: La masɛ tɩ a pa'ala nẽr-sɛba n ka sakrɩ la, la sũ-bʋgsʋm, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tã wʋn basɛ tɩ ba teege yɛm mɛ bãŋɛ sɩra,

ref: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
text: le yẽ yɛm sõŋɔ yese Asũtãana bẽrgɔ la pʋam, tɩ a daan tarɩ ba tɩ ba ɩta ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em na.

ref: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
text: Bãŋɛ tɩ dũnia ba'asgɔ wakatɛ, la wʋn dɛna la toogo.

ref: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
text: la nẽrba n ka nõŋɛ taaba, la nẽrba n ka tarɩ nẽra zĩile, la gõngõ'osrɩba, la nẽrba n ka tarɩ ba mẽŋa sõŋa, la nẽr-tɔɔsɩ, la nẽrba n sisri sɛla n ãn sõŋa,

ref: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
text: la zãm dõma, la nẽrba n ka yõkrɩ ba mẽŋa ɩta sɛla n ka masɛ tɔtɔ, la uk-m-mẽŋa dõma, la nẽrba n nõŋɛ sɛla n ɩtɩ bãma mẽŋa sũure yẽlʋm gãnna Nawẽnnɛ.

ref: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
text: Ba ɩtɩ tɩ la ãna wʋ ba sakrɩ la Nawẽnnɛ, la ba ka sakrɩ a pãŋa la. Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nẽr-bãma buuri.

ref: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
text: Ba nẽrba basɛba kẽ'erɩ la yiɛ pʋam pã'asra pɔg-sɛba yɛm n ka boe zẽ'a ayɩla la. Pɔg-bãma tõm na tõon-be'ero tɩ la dɛna zeero bɔ ba, ban boorɩ se'em na n tarɩ ba yɛ'ɛna,

ref: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
text: tɩ ba zãsna wakatɛ wuu dee ka tãna wʋn bãŋɛ sɛla n de sɩra la.

ref: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
text: Nẽr-bãma ka sakrɩ sɩra, wʋ Azanɛsɩ la Azãmbrɛsɩ n yʋʋn ka sakɛ bɔ Amoyisi se'em na. Ba de la nẽrba yɛm n bʋrʋm, tɩ ba Nawẽnnɛ doosgo la lebge zãŋa.

ref: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
text: La ba kãn sẽŋɛ nẽŋa, se'ere n soe la, nẽrba wuu wʋn yẽ ba yalnɛ na mɛ, wʋ ban yʋʋn yẽ Azanɛsɩ la Azãmbrɛsɩ yelle se'em na.

ref: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
text: La fõn mi bõn-sɛba tɩ mam zãsʋm nẽrba mɛ, fʋ mi mam yel-ɩrɛ, la mam yɛm loore n ãn se'em mɛ, la fʋ mi mam n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em, la mam sũ-mã'arɛ, la mam nõŋlʋm, la mam n ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ se'em,

ref: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
text: fʋ mi nẽrba n nãmsɛ mam se'em, la toog-sɛba wuu n paagɛ mam Antɩyɔsɩ, la Ikonim, la Listri tẽnsɩ pʋam Azezi ĩyã. Bẽm nãmsgɔ tɩ mam ka yẽ? La Zuudãana la fãagɛ mam bɛla wuu pʋam mɛ.

ref: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
text: La de la bɛla, nẽr-sɛba wuu n boorɩ tɩ ba vɔa wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam, ba wʋn nãmsɛ ba mɛ.

ref: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
text: La tõon-be'ero dõma, la sɛba n pã'asrɩ nẽrba wʋn ken kẽ'era la tõon-be'ero pʋam pa'asra wɛ'ɛsa, ba pã'asrɩ la nẽrba, dee pã'asra ba mẽŋa.

ref: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
text: La sãn dɛna fõn, tara bõn-sɛba tɩ fʋ zãsʋm dee sakɛ tɩ la de la sɩra la kãŋkãŋɛ, fʋ mi nẽr-sɛba zẽ'am tɩ fõn zãsʋm bõn-bãma.

ref: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
text: Fõn põn mina Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ la mɛ halɩ fʋ bõnbɩ'ɩlʋm, ẽŋa n tã wʋn bɔ fɔ yɛm, tɩ fʋ yẽ fãarɛ fõn bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra la ĩyã.

ref: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
text: Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ la wuu de la Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ ba gʋlsɛ, a yõorɔ de la a zãsʋm nẽrba sɩra, la a botɩ nẽrba bãŋɛ ba koŋre, la a kã'an nẽrba, la a pa'alɛ nẽrba tɩ ba ɩta sɛla n masɛ ãna sõŋa,

ref: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
text: bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽra wʋn masɛ, mãasʋm tã'agɛ tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

ref: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
text: Mam bɔ'ɔrɩ fʋ nõorɛ Nawẽnnɛ, la Azezi-krisi n wʋn wa'am wa di nẽr-vɔɔsɩ, la nẽr-sɛba n ki sarɩya la nẽŋam, la ẽn wʋn wa di a na'am na ĩyã,

ref: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
text: tɩ fʋ mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la. Nẽrba sãn sɛlsra, bɩɩ ba sãn ka sɛlsra, mõolɛ le malɩn mõolɛ wakatɛ wuu. Tɔgɛ pa'alɛ ba tɩ ba bãŋɛ ba koŋre, gi ba, dee bɔ ba bʋraanɛ tɩ ba ɩta sõŋa, ɩta bɛla wuu la sũ-mã'asʋm dee tara zãsŋɔ pʋtẽ'erɛ.

ref: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
text: Se'ere n soe la, wakatɛ n sẽm tɩ nẽrba kãn le bɔɔra tɩ ba selse sɩra zãsŋɔ la, ba wʋn dɔla la ba mẽŋa yɛm n boorɩ se'em, bɛla ba wʋn ɛɛra la karẽnsãandõma zozo'e n wʋn zãsʋm ba sɛla tɩ ba nõŋɛ tɩ ba selse mã'a.

ref: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
text: Ba wʋn lɩ ba tʋba mɛ kãn sɛlsra sɩra la, dee wẽrgɛ sɛlsra sɛla n de sɔlma.

ref: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
text: La fõn, tara fʋ mẽŋa sõŋa sɛla woo pʋam, sakɛ nãmsgɔ, mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la, la fʋ tõm tõonɛ na tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ fʋ nu'usum na sõŋa.

ref: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
text: La sãn dɛna mam, mam vɔm ãn wʋ ko'om tɩ ba ka'agɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ, mam daarɛ paagɛ mɛ, tɩ mam wʋn fõrgɛ.

ref: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
text: Mam mẽ mẽerɛ sõŋa mɛ yãŋɛ, mam zoe paagɛ zʋa la tɛka mɛ, la mam bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra mɛ ka basɛ.

ref: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
text: Lɛɛlɛ wã, tã'arɛ yɔɔrɔ gã mɛ gu'ura mam, tɩ Zuudãana n diti sarɩya wʋ lan masɛ la, wʋn dɩkɛ bɔ mam daarɛ ẽŋa daarɛ. La, la dagɩ mam mã'a, la de la nẽr-sɛba wuu n nõŋɛ ẽ bɔɔra tɩ a leme wa'am na. Apolɩ soolʋm Atimõtɩ tɩ a wa'am

ref: Come to see me as soon as you can.
text: Mõrgɛ wa'am mam zẽ'am tɔtɔ.

ref: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
text: Se'ere n soe la, Ademasɩ basɛ mam mɛ dee sẽŋɛ Tesaloniki, ẽn nõŋɛ dũnia wã bõn-yooro la ĩyã. La Akresãnsɩ sẽŋɛ la Galatɩ, tɩ Atiti mẽ sẽŋɛ Dalmatɩ,

ref: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
text: Aluki mã'a n weege mam zẽ'am. Fʋ sãn sẽna, fʋ tarɩ Amarkɩ wa'am, tɩ a tarɩ sõŋrɛ mɛ bɔ mam tõonɛ na ĩyã.

ref: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
text: Mam tõm Atisiki la Efɛɛzɩ.

ref: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
text: Fʋ sãn sẽna, fʋ dɩkɛ m ɔɔrɔ fuugo la tɩ mam daan basɛ Trʋasɩ Akarpusi zẽ'am na tarɩ wa'am, la fʋ dɩkɛ gõnnɔ na pa'asɛ, lan gãnnɩ wuu gõn-sɛba tɩ ba gʋlsɛ la dũnsi gãna kilim na.

ref: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
text: Alɛgsãndrɩ n de kuta la ẽŋɛ mam na be'em halɩ zozo'e, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn yɔ ẽ ẽn ẽŋɛ se'em na.

ref: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
text: Fʋ mẽ guuse fʋ mẽŋa la ẽ, tɩ a sɩ'ɩsɛ tõma yetɔga la mɛ zozo'e.

ref: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
text: Mam n daan ze'ele sarɩyadia zẽ'am pɔspɔsɩ la, nẽra nẽra ka ze'ele mam poorʋm sõŋɛ mam, ba wuu basɛ mam mɛ. Nawẽnnɛ da geele ban ẽŋɛ se'em na.

ref: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
text: La Zuudãana la daan ze'ele mam poorʋm mɛ sõŋɛ mam, bɔ mam pãŋa halɩ tɩ mam mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la sõŋa sõŋa, tɩ bu-zãŋsɩ zozo'e wõm. La mam daan yẽ fãarɛ mɛ gɩgnɛ nõorʋm.

ref: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
text: Zuudãana la n wʋn ken fãagɛ mam yese mam be'em wuu pʋam, kẽ'esɛ mam a so'olʋm na pʋam. Ẽŋa n soe nã'asgɔ wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina. Pʋ'ʋsgɔ

ref: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
text: Pʋ'ʋsɛ Aprisili, la Akila, la A'onezifɔɔrɩ yir-dõma.

ref: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
text: A'erastɩ weege la Korẽntɩ. La Atrofim bẽ'erɩ mɛ, tɩ mam basɛ ẽ Milɛtɩ.

ref: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
text: Mõrgɛ wa'am dee tɩ ɔɔrɔ wakatɛ paagɛ. A'ebulusi la Apudẽnsɩ, la Alinusi, la Aklodia, la tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ.

ref: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
text: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn bɔna la fɔ. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya a yel-sõnnɛ.

ref: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
text: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã, mam de la Nawẽnnɛ yamŋa, la Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna tɩ a tõm tɩ m mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga tɩ sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge la bɔ sɩra, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n pa'alɩ ban wʋn dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore se'em.

ref: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
text: Tɩ tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ tɩ wʋn yẽ la vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n dagɩ põmpɔrma la daan bĩŋe nõorɛ halɩ tɩ dũnia nãn ka nãam.

ref: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
text: La wakatɛ n paagɛ la, a puke bõn-ẽŋa mɛ pa'alɛ a yetɔga pʋam, a dɩkɛ a yetɔga la ẽŋɛ la mam nu'usum tɩ m mõolɛ bɔ nẽrba, wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra n bɔ nõorɛ se'em na.

ref: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
text: Mam n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra Atiti n lebge mam mẽŋa bia, tõma n lagɩm dɔla Azezi-krisi la ĩyã. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Fãagra Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fɔ a yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ fɔ a sũ-mã'asʋm. Atiti n wʋn tõm se'em Krɛtɩ

ref: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
text: Mam n daan botɩ fʋ weege Krɛtɩ la, la de la fʋ malgɛ bõn-sɛba n deege dɛna ba malgɛ ba'asɛ la, la fʋ looge kẽma tẽŋa woo Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba pʋam wʋ mam n yele fʋ se'em na.

ref: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
text: Kẽema masɛ tɩ a dɛna la nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, tɩ a kɔma bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra, ka ɩta yooryooro, dee nanna nẽrba.

ref: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
text: Dẽnɩ tɩ nẽŋadãana n bɩsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba yelle dɛna nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a da dɛna pa'al-m-mẽŋa dãana, bɩɩ sũ-isgre dãana, a da dɛna dã-yũura, bɩɩ zɛbzɛbra, bɩɩ nẽra n ɩtɩ sɛla n ka masɛ yẽta bõntarsõm.

ref: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
text: La masɛ tɩ a tara sɩra zãsŋɔ la kãŋkãŋɛ, wʋ ban zãsʋm ẽ se'em na, tɩ a wʋn tã'agɛ bɔ nẽrba bʋraanɛ tɩ ba dɔla sɩra zãsŋɔ la, dee tã'agɛ pa'alɛ sɩ'ɩsrɩba tɩ ba bãŋɛ ba koŋre.

ref: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
text: Se'ere n soe la, nẽrba zozo'e n boe dɛna sɩ'ɩsrɩba, la yetɔg-yooro dõma, dee pã'asra nẽrba. Lan gãnnɩ wuu, nẽr-bãma boe la Zifdõma n wãtɩ la pʋam.

ref: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
text: La masɛ tɩ fʋ gu ba tɩ ba da tɔgra bɛla, tɩ ba zãsnɩ nẽrba la sɛla n ka masɛ, wã'ara nẽrba basɛba yiɛ, ba zãsnɩ sɛla n ka masɛ ɛɛra la bõntarsõm.

ref: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
text: Krɛtɩ dõma mẽŋa bãŋra ayɩla yʋʋn yetɩ: «Krɛtɩ dõma de la põmpɔrndõma wakatɛ wuu, la pʋtʋʋl-dõma ãna wʋ we-dũnsi la, ba de la zẽyãgsɩ dee tara pʋyã'anɛ.»

ref: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
text: Yel-ẽŋa de la sɩra, bɛla ĩyã, kã'an ba sõŋa sõŋa tɩ ba dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la sõŋa.

ref: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
text: Yele ba tɩ ba basɛ Zifdõma sɔlma, la bõn-sɛba tɩ nẽrba zagsɛ sɩra dee bɔ nõorɛ tɩ ba ɩta la.

ref: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
text: Sɛla woo ãn sõŋa mɛ bɔ nẽr-sɛka n de pʋpeelem dãana, la sɛka n de tõon-dẽgrɔ dãana ka sakra Nawẽnnɛ, sɛla sɛla ka boe n ãn sõŋa bɔ ẽ. Ẽŋa pʋtẽ'erɛ, la a yɛm wuu ki mɛ.

ref: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
text: Ba yetɩ bãma mi Nawẽnnɛ mɛ, la ba tõoma la pa'alɩ tɩ ba sɩ'ɩsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ. Ba de la nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ gãŋɛ, la ba ka sakrɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõorɛ, dee ka tãna wʋn tõm tõon-sõŋɔ.

ref: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
text: La fõn, zãsʋm nẽrba la bõn-sɛba n masɛ la sɩra zãsŋɔ la.

ref: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
text: Zãsʋm bʋra-yã'asɩ tɩ ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa, ba dɛna nẽrba tɩ ba nannɩ, ba tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, la ba dɛna nẽrba n dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la sõŋa, ba tara nõŋlʋm, dee dɛna nẽrba n mã'agɛ ba sũure sẽnna nẽŋa.

ref: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
text: Yele pɔg-yã'asɩ tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ pʋam ba dɛna pʋpeelem dõma, la ba da dɛna gõngõ'osrɩba, ba da dɛna nẽrba n dɩkɛ ba mẽŋa bɔ dãam. Ba pa'ala sɛla n ãn sõŋa,

ref: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
text: ba pa'ala pɔg-bɩ'ɩsɩ tɩ ba nõŋɛ ba sɩrba, la ba kɔma,

ref: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
text: tɩ ba tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, tɩ ba da ɩta dẽgrɔ, tɩ ba dɛna pɔg-mẽnsɩ, la pɔg-sõma, tɩ ba sakra ba sɩrba, tɩ nẽrba da pɔ'ɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la.

ref: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
text: Kã'an kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ la mẽ tɩ ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa sɛla woo pʋam.

ref: Always set a good example for others. Be sincere and serious when you teach.
text: Fõn mẽŋa botɩ fʋ yel-ɩrɛ wuu ãna sõŋa, pa'alɛ ba ban wʋn ãna se'em, la fʋ zãsʋm nẽrba Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la sɩra, la ninmõ'orɛ.

ref: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
text: La fʋ tɔgra sɩra tɩ ba da tã'agɛ zɛrgɛ fɔ, tɩ yãnnɛ wʋn yõkɛ sɛba n sɩ'ɩsrɩ la, ban kãn yẽ sɛla n de be'em tɩ zẽ'am tɔgɛ la ĩyã.

ref: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
text: Yele yamsɩ tɩ ba sakra ba zuudãandõma sɛla woo pʋam, ɩta ba sũure yẽlʋm, ba da zagsɛ ba nõorɛ,

ref: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
text: la ba da zũura ba lɔgrɔ. Ba tõnna tõon-sõma pa'alɛ tɩ bãma de la sɩra dõma, bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra zãsŋɔ la wʋn yẽta pẽka sɛla woo pʋam.

ref: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
text: Bẽm ĩyã, Nawẽnnɛ botɩ tɩ bãŋɛ a yel-sõnnɛ la n de fãarɛ bɔ nẽrsaalba wuu la mɛ.

ref: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
text: A zãsnɩ tõma tɩ tɩ basɛ la sɛla n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore, la dũnia nẽrba n boorɩ sɛla la, dee vɔa dũnia wã zuo la pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, la sɩra, dee dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore sõŋa.

ref: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
text: Bɛla tɩ tɩ wʋn tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sũ-yẽlga daarɛ la, daar-ẽŋa Azezi-krisi n wʋn leme wa'am la a na'am pãŋa. Ẽŋa n de tõma Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Fãagra.

ref: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
text: Ẽŋa n dɩkɛ a vɔm bɔ tõma ĩyã, tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ tõon-be'ero wuu pʋam, dee basɛ tɩ tɩ malgɛ ãna sõŋa dɛna a mẽŋa nẽrba, mõrgɛ tõnna tõon-sõma.

ref: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
text: La de la bɛla tɩ fʋ wʋn zãsʋm ba, bɔ ba bʋraanɛ, dee kã'an ba. Ẽŋɛ bɛla la nõorɛ sɛka tɩ fʋ tarɩ la. Da basɛ tɩ nẽra pɔ'ɔgɛ fɔ.

ref: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
text: Tẽegɛ ba wuu yetɩ la masɛ mɛ tɩ ba nanna tẽŋa la nẽŋadõma, la kɛ'ɛndõma dee sakra ba nõorɛ, dee tõnna tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

ref: and not say cruel things or argue. They should be gentle and kind to everyone.
text: Ba da tɔgra nẽrba be'em, ba da dɛna zɛbzɛbrɩba, la ba dɛna nẽrba n tarɩ sũ-mã'asʋm, dee ɩta sũ-bʋgsʋm la nẽrba wuu.

ref: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
text: Tõma mẽ daan de la nẽrba n ka mi sɛla, la sɩ'ɩsrɩba, la nẽrba n bʋrgɛ ka dɔla sɩra sore, tɩ tõma yɛmleego, la bõn-yooro tɩ tõma boorɩ la sɔna tõma. Tõma daan vɔa la pʋtʋʋlgɔ pʋam, ɩta sũure la tɩ taaba bõnɔ, dee dɛna nẽrba tɩ ba ka nõŋɛ, dee sisra taaba.

ref: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
text: La Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra la n wa pa'alɛ nẽrsaalba a yel-sõnnɛ, la a nõŋlʋm na,

ref: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
text: a fãagɛ tɩ mɛ, la, la dagɩ tɩn tõm tõon-sõma ĩyã, la de la a mẽŋa ninbãal-zʋa ĩyã tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ. A botɩ a Sɩa la n peege tõma sũure dẽgrɔ botɩ tɩ lebge nẽr-paalsɩ tara vɔm paalga.

ref: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
text: La de la Azezi-krisi n de tɩ Fãagra la ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la sõŋa sõŋa,

ref: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
text: tɩ a yel-sõnnɛ na botɩ tõma masɛ a nẽŋam, lebge a kɔma wʋn yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ tɩ tõma tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la.

ref: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
text: Yetɔg-ẽna de la sɩra. Bɛla tɩ mam bɔɔra tɩ fʋ mõrgɛ pa'alɛ ba yel-bãma, tɩ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la mõrgɛ tõnna tõon-sõma. Yel-bãma n ãn sõŋa dee tara yõorɔ bɔ'ɔra nẽrba.

ref: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
text: La sãn dɛna nõke'en-yooro, la yaabdõma deto kãalgɔ, la nõkɛ'ɛma wẽ'a Zifdõma lɔɔ la yɛla, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la bõn-bãma, se'ere n soe la, ba ka tarɩ yõorɔ, ba de la zãŋa.

ref: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
text: Nẽra sãn tara welgre sẽnna, fʋ kã'an ẽ nõorɛ ayi, tɩ a sãn ken zagsɛ, fʋ basɛ ẽ, la ya da le tara yetɔga la ẽ.

ref: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
text: Tɩ fʋ mi tɩ nẽr-ẽŋa buuri bʋrgɛ mɛ basɛ sɩra sore, dee tõnna tõon-be'ero n pa'alɩ tɩ a kãn yẽ bʋʋrɔ. Ba'asgɔ yetɔga, la pʋ'ʋsgɔ

ref: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
text: Mam wʋn tõm na Artemasɩ bɩɩ Atisiki fʋ zẽ'am, a sãn wa'am, fʋ nargɛ pãŋa wa'am mam zẽ'am Nikopoli, tɩ mam looge yɛm tɩ m bɔna la bilam tɩ ɔɔrɔ wakatɛ tole.

ref: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
text: Mõrgɛ bɩsɛ Azenaasɩ n de yetɔg-mita, la Apolɔsɩ sore sẽnnɛ na yelle, tɩ sɛla da pɔ'ɔgɛ ba.

ref: Our people should learn to spend their time doing something useful and worthwhile.
text: Tõma nẽrba la masɛ mɛ tɩ ba zãsʋm tõnna tõon-sõma tɩ la sõŋɛ sɛba n boorɩ sõŋrɛ la, dee da vɔa vɔm n ka tarɩ yõorɔ.

ref: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
text: Nẽr-sɛba n boe la mam na wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ. Pʋ'ʋsɛ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Azezi sɩra nõŋɛ tõma la. Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

ref: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
text: Mam Apolɩ n boe yʋ'a deem Azezi-krisi yelle, la tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra tɩ sɩr-sõŋɔ Afilmõ n de tɩ tõntõn-tadãana,

ref: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
text: la tɩ tã Apɩa, la Arsipi n lagɩm na tõma yẽ nãmsgɔ Azezi tõoma pʋam na, la Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la n lagsrɩ fʋ yire pʋam na.

ref: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
text: Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

ref: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
text: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ daarɛ woo a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ, dee tẽra fʋ yelle m pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam ka basra.

ref: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
text: Se'ere n soe la, mam wõm ban tɔgrɩ fõn bɔ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi sɩra se'em, la fõn tarɩ nõŋlʋm Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu ĩyã se'em.

ref: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
text: Mam sosrɩ Nawẽnnɛ tɩ fõn lagɩm na tõma bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra la wʋn sẽnna nẽŋa, a wʋn basɛ tɩ fʋ bãŋɛ bõn-sõma sɛba wuu tɩ tɩ tarɩ Krisi doosgo pʋam.

ref: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
text: M sɔbia, fʋ nõŋlʋm na bɔ mam sũ-yẽlga zozo'e mɛ, dee bɔ mam bʋraanɛ, fõn botɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu sũure mã'agɛ la ĩyã.

ref: Christ gives me the courage to tell you what to do.
text: Bɛla tɩ baa mam n tarɩ nɩ nõorɛ wʋn yele fo tɩ fʋ ẽŋɛ se'em Krisi ĩyã la, mam ka ẽŋɛ bɛla,

ref: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
text: mam sosrɩ fʋ la nõŋlʋm. La de la mam Apolɩ n de bʋra-yã'aŋa, mam boe la yʋ'a deem lɛɛlɛ wã Azezi-krisi yelle.

ref: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
text: Mam sosrɩ fʋ la A'onezim tɩ mam boe yʋ'a deem tɩ a sakɛ Azezi lebge mam bia la ĩyã.

ref: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
text: Kʋrʋm, a daan ka tarɩ yõorɔ bɔ fɔ, la lɛɛlɛ wã a yãŋa tarɩ yõorɔ mɛ bɔ fõn na mam.

ref: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
text: Mam lebe tõnna ẽ na fõn zẽ'am, mam nõŋɛ ẽ na m sũure wuu.

ref: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
text: Mam boorɩ nɩ tɩ a bɔna la mam zẽ'am to'oge fõn zẽ'a sõŋra mam, mam n ken bɔna yʋ'a deem Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã la.

ref: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
text: La mam ka boorɩ tɩ m ẽŋɛ sɛla tɩ fõn sãn ka sakɛ, tɩ la da kãn dɛna mam mõrgɛ fʋ mɛ tɩ fʋ ẽŋɛ mam yel-sõnnɛ, la dɛna fʋ mẽŋa n boorɩ se'em.

ref: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
text: Tã tɩ A'onezim n daan basɛ fõn dee fõrgɛ wakatɛ fẽe la, la de la tɩ fʋ le to'oge ẽ tɩ a bɔna la fʋ wakatɛ wuu.

ref: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
text: La a ka le dɛna fʋ to'oge ẽ tɩ a dɛna fʋ yamŋa mã'a, a gãnnɩ yamŋa mɛ, a yãŋa de la sɔbi-nõŋrɛ. Mam nõŋɛ ẽ mɛ halɩ zozo'e, la fõn wʋn nõŋɛ ẽ gãnna, se'ere n soe la, a de la fʋ yamŋa dee ken dɛna fʋ sɔbia Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.

ref: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
text: Bɛla, fʋ sãn dɛna mam sɩrɛ, fʋ to'oge ẽ wʋ fõn wʋn to'oge mam mẽŋa se'em na.

ref: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
text: La a sãn ẽŋɛ fʋ tuuge, bɩɩ a sãn tara fʋ sãnnɛ, basɛ tɩ la dɛna mam sãnnɛ.

ref: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
text: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ wãna la mam mẽŋa nu'ugo yetɩ: Mam wʋn yɔ fɔ. Mam kãn tẽegɛ fɔ tɩ fʋ mẽŋa tarɩ mam sãnnɛ, la de la mam n sõŋɛ fɔ tɩ fʋ yẽ vɔm.

ref: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
text: Ẽe, m sɔbia, ẽŋɛ yel-ẽna bɔ mam, Zuudãana la ĩyã. Botɩ m sũure mã'agɛ Krisi ĩyã.

ref: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
text: La mam sosrɩ tɩ fʋ ken mãasʋm gã'argɔ zẽ'a bɔ ma, tɩ mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ yãma n pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ na ĩyã, ba wʋn basɛ mam tɩ m leme wa'am ya zẽ'am.

ref: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
text: A'epafrasɩ n lagɩm na mam bɔna yʋ'a deem Azezi-krisi yelle la pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ.

ref: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
text: La mam tõntõn-taaba, Aluki la Amarkɩ, la Aristarkɩ, la Ademasɩ mẽ pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ.

ref: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
text: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

ref: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
text: Kʋrʋm, Nawẽnnɛ yʋʋn botɩ a nõtɔ'ɔsrɩba n tɔgɛ nõorɛ zozo'e bɔ tɩ yaabdõma, la yetɔga buuri to'oto'ore.

ref: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
text: La lɛɛlɛ wã n de ba'asgɔ wakatɛ la, Nawẽnnɛ botɩ a Dayʋa la n tɔgɛ bɔ tɔ. La doose la ẽŋa tɩ a nãam dũnia la saazuum wuu, la a botɩ ẽŋa n sɔna sɛla woo.

ref: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
text: Ẽŋa n tarɩ Nawẽnnɛ na'am pãŋa wa pa'alɛ tɔ, a ãn wʋ Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa n ãn se'em na. La a yetɔga la tarɩ pãŋa mɛ botɩ sɛla woo bɔna a zẽ'a. Ẽŋa n yese nẽrsaalba tõon-be'ero tɩ ba lebge sõŋa la poorʋm, a sẽŋɛ ka zẽa la Naba Wẽnnɛ zʋʋgɔ saazuum-zuum.

ref: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
text: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zẽkɛ ẽ tɩ a gãnna malɛkadõma halɩ zozo'e dee bɔ ẽ yʋ'ʋrɛ n gãnnɩ malɛkadõma yʋ'ʋra. Nawẽnnɛ Dayʋa Azezi-krisi n gãnnɩ malɛkadõma

ref: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
text: Nawẽnnɛ ka yele malɛka baa ayɩla yetɩ: «Fõn de mam Dayʋa, zĩna mam lebge la fʋ Sɔ.» La a ken ka yele malɛka yetɩ: «Mam n wʋn dɛna fʋ Sɔ, tɩ fʋ dɛna mam Dayʋa.»

ref: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
text: La ẽn daan tõm a bi-kẽŋa la dũnia pʋam na, a yele yetɩ: «Dẽnɩ tɩ malɛkadõma wuu nã'asra ẽ.»

ref: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
text: La sãn dɛna malɛkadõma la yelle, a tɔgɛ yetɩ, ba de la ẽŋa tõntõnɩba, ẽŋa basɛ tɩ ba ãna wʋ kʋsebgo la, dee basɛ tɩ ba ãna wʋ bug-zɩlɩsɩ la.

ref: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
text: La a yele a Dayʋa la yelle yetɩ: «Fõn de la Nawẽnnɛ, fʋ na'am na wʋn bɔna la wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Fʋ wʋn sɔna fʋ so'olʋm na la sɩra.

ref: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
text: Fõn nõŋɛ la sɛla n masɛ, dee sisra be'em. Bɛla n soe tɩ fʋ Nawẽnnɛ welge fʋ to'ore, bɔ fɔ pẽka, la sũ-yẽlga gãnna basɛba wuu.»

ref: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
text: Dee ken yetɩ: «Zuudãana, fõn nãam tẽŋa halɩ pĩ'iluŋo wakatɛ, la saazuum wuu de la fõn nu'usi tõoma.

ref: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
text: Ba wuu wʋn sã'am mɛ, la fõn wʋn weege bɔna. Ba wʋn kʋrgɛ wʋ fuugo n kʋrgrɩ se'em na.

ref: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
text: Fʋ wʋn lobe ba basɛ wʋ fuugo tɩ ba kilim lobe basɛ la. Bõnɔ wuu wʋn teege wʋ ban teerɩ fu-kɛka la. La fõn, fõn de la fõn de se'em na ka tɛɛra, fõn yʋʋma ka tarɩ tɛka.»

ref: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
text: Nawẽnnɛ ka yele malɛka baa ayɩla yetɩ: «Zĩ'ire m zʋʋgɔ, halɩ tɩ m wa basɛ tɩ fʋ bɛ'ɛba bɔna fʋ nãma tẽŋa.»

ref: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
text: Malɛkadõma de la bẽm? Ba de la sɩɩsɩ n tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tõnna ba, tɩ ba sõŋra nẽr-sɛba n de ba yẽ fãarɛ la.

ref: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
text: Bɛla n soe tɩ la masɛ tɩ tõma gʋrɛ yetɔga la tɩ tɩ wõm na sõŋa sõŋa, tɩ tɩ da bʋrgɛ.

ref: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
text: Malɛkadõma n yʋʋn tɔgɛ yetɔg-sɛba kʋrʋm na ẽŋɛ ba tõonɛ mɛ, nẽr-sɛba n sɩ'ɩsɛ ka sakɛ ba la, yẽ sɩbgrɛ sɛka n masɛ tɩ ba yẽ la mɛ.

ref: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
text: La sãn dɛna bɛla, tõma sãn pɔ'ɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ fãarɛ kãtɛ ẽna, tõma wʋn ẽŋɛ la wãne põsɛ sɩbgrɛ? Zuudãana mẽŋa n daan põn dẽŋɛ mõolɛ fãarɛ ẽŋa yelle, tɩ nẽr-sɛba n wõm na pa'alɛ tõma tɩ la de la sɩra.

ref: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
text: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa mẽ tõm tõon-yãlma, la yel-kɩrsɩ, la bõn-yãlma buuri wuu to'oto'ore, dee bɔ nẽrba a Sɩa pãŋa wʋ ẽn boorɩ se'em, pa'alɛ tɩ la de la sɩra. Azezi n tarɩ fãarɛ wa'am

ref: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
text: La dagɩ malɛkadõma tɩ Nawẽnnɛ yetɩ ba sɔna dũnia sɛka n sẽm tɩ tõma tɔgra a yelle la.

ref: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
text: La nẽra n tɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ la pʋam zẽ'a ayẽma yetɩ: «Nẽrsaala de la bẽm tɩ fõn tẽra a yelle? Nẽrsaala bia de la bẽm tɩ fõn bɩsra a yelle?

ref: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
text: Fõn basɛ mɛ tɩ a ka paagɛ malɛkadõma wakatɛ fẽe mã'a, dee yãŋa nã'asɛ ẽ, bɔ ẽ na'am pãŋa la pẽka.

ref: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
text: Fõn basɛ mɛ tɩ a sɔna sɛla woo.» Lan yetɩ Nawẽnnɛ basɛ tɩ sɛla woo sakra nẽrsaala la, a ka basɛ tɩ sɛla weege ka sakra ẽ. La, lan de se'em na, tõma nãn ka yẽtɩ tɩ sɛla woo sakrɩ ẽ.

ref: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
text: La tõma yẽ tɩ la de la Azezi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ sike tɩ a ka paagɛ malɛkadõma wakatɛ fẽfẽe, dee yãŋa nã'asɛ ẽ, bɔ ẽ na'am pãŋa la pẽka ẽn nãmsɛ ki la ĩyã. La de la Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ ĩyã, tɩ a ki nẽrsaalba wuu ĩyã.

ref: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
text: Nawẽnnɛ n de sɛka n basɛ tɩ sɛla woo bɔna, dɛna a bõnɔ na, la masɛ la ẽŋa yɛm n boorɩ se'em tɩ a botɩ Azezi nãmsɛ, ẽŋɛ sɛla woo ba'asɛ, fãagɛ nẽrba, tarɩ a kɔma zozo'e sẽŋɛ a na'am pãŋa zẽ'am.

ref: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
text: Azezi n malgrɩ nẽrba tɩ ba dɛna pʋpeelem dõma, la sɛba tɩ a malgɛ tɩ ba dɛna pʋpeelem dõma la lagɩm tara la Sɔ ayɩla. Bɛla n soe tɩ a ka zɔta yãnnɛ tɩ a wi ba tɩ a sɔbiisi.

ref: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
text: Bɛla tɩ a yele Nawẽnnɛ yetɩ: «Mam wʋn tɔgɛ fʋ yelle m sɔbiisi zẽ'am, mam wʋn nã'asɛ fɔ ba lagsgɔ zẽ'am.»

ref: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
text: Dee le yetɩ: «Mam wʋn dɩkɛ m sɩra wuu bɔ la Nawẽnnɛ.» Dee ken yetɩ: «Mam n wãna, mam na kɔm-sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ mam na.»

ref: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
text: Kɔma la tɩ a tɔgrɩ la n de nẽrsaalba tara ĩyã la zɩɩm na, bɛla tɩ Azezi mẽ lebge nẽrsaala wʋ bãma la ki, tɩ a kũm na sã'am Asũtãana n de sɛka n basɛ tɩ nẽrba kiira la pãŋa.

ref: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
text: La de la bɛla tɩ a ẽŋɛ fãagɛ sɛba tɩ kũm dabeem tarɩ ba botɩ ba ãna wʋ yamsɩ ba vɔm na wuu pʋam na basɛ.

ref: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
text: La dagɩ malɛkadõma tɩ a wa'am tɩ a sõŋɛ, la de la Abraham yɩɩsɩ la tɩ a wa'am tɩ a sõŋɛ.

ref: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
text: Bɛla n soe tɩ la daan masɛ tɩ a lebge nẽrsaala ãna wʋ a sɔbiisi la sɛla woo pʋam, tã'agɛ dɛna ba kãabgɔ kẽma nẽŋadãana n de ninbãal-zɔta, dee dɛna sɩra dãana Nawẽnnɛ tõoma pʋam. A ẽŋɛ la bɛla yese nẽrba tõon-be'ero, naagɛ ba la Nawẽnnɛ.

ref: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
text: Azezi mẽŋa n daan yẽ nãmsgɔ wakatɛ sɛba tɩ Asũtãana makɛ ẽ bɩsɛ la, a tã wʋn sõŋɛ nẽr-sɛba n yẽtɩ nãmsgɔ la mɛ, bɔ ba pãŋa.

ref: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
text: Bɛla m sɔbiisi, yãma tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wi tɩ ya welge to'ore dɛna a nẽrba la, bɩsra-ya Azezi, ẽŋa n de sɛka tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tõm, la ẽŋa n de tõma kãabgɔ kẽma nẽŋadãana Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo la pʋam.

ref: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
text: A de la sɩra dãana sɛka n looge ẽ na zẽ'am, wʋ Amoyisi n yʋʋn de sɩra dãana se'em Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la pʋam na.

ref: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
text: La masɛ mɛ tɩ Azezi yẽ nã'asgɔ gãnna Amoyisi halɩ zozo'e, wʋ de-mẽta n yẽtɩ pẽka gãnna deego la mẽŋa se'em na.

ref: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
text: Asɩra, deego woo de la nẽra n mẽ ẽ, la sɛla woo mẽta de la Nawẽnnɛ.

ref: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
text: La sãn dɛna Amoyisi, a yʋʋn de la tõntõnna n de sɩra dãana Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba n ãn wʋ deego la pʋam, dẽŋɛ tɔgɛ sɛla n wʋn wa tɔgɛ la yelle.

ref: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
text: La Krisi de la Nawẽnnɛ Dayʋa n de sɩra dãana sɔna deego la. A deego la de la tõma, tõma sãn ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ la bʋraanɛ, dee tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla tɩ tɩ bɔ sɩra la, la sũ-yẽlga, ka paagɛ ba'asgɔ. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ a nẽrba vo'osgo

ref: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
text: Bɛla, sakɛ-ya Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n yele se'em yetɩ: «Zĩna, ya sãn wõm Nawẽnnɛ kõa,

ref: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
text: ya da kɛ'ɛm ya sũure, wʋ ya yaabdõma n yʋʋn kɛ'ɛm ba sũure sɩ'ɩsɛ Nawẽnnɛ nõorɛ se'em, makɛ ẽ bɩsɛ weem na.»

ref: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
text: Nawẽnnɛ yetɩ: «Bilam, ya yaabdõma yʋʋn makɛ mam mɛ bɩsɛ, baa ban yʋʋn yẽ mam tõoma yʋʋma pinaasɩ la.

ref: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
text: Bɛla tɩ mam sũure yʋʋn yĩige la zamãan-ẽŋa nẽrba. Tɩ mam yetɩ: ‹Ba pʋtẽ'era la botɩ ba tuura mɛ wakatɛ wuu, tɩ ba ka dɔla mam sore.›

ref: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
text: Mam sũ-yĩire la pʋam, mam pɔɩ mɛ yetɩ: ‹Ba kãn malɩn kẽ zẽ'e-sɛka tɩ mam yetɩ m bɔ ba tɩ ba yẽ vo'osgo la.› »

ref: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
text: M sɔbiisi, guuse-ya ya mẽŋa tɩ ya nẽr-sɛka da tara pʋtẽ'e-be'ero n wʋn basɛ tɩ a ka bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra, tɩ bõn-ẽŋa basɛ tɩ a welge la Nawẽnnɛ n de vɔm dãana la.
